title: Building a physics-aware AI ecosystem for solid-state hydrogen storage materials
summary: Hydrogen storage remains a central bottleneck for scalable hydrogen energy systems due to the multiscale and coupled nature of the thermodynamics, kinetics, and microstructural evolution of hydrogen storage materials (HSMs). Although artificial intelligence (AI) has accelerated materials discovery, current approaches remain constrained by fragmented data, limited physical consistency, and weak integration with experimental validation. Here, we propose a unified framework that integrates coherent data infrastructure, physics-grounded modeling, and AI-driven inverse design within a closed-loop discovery paradigm. By embedding physical constraints and experimental feedback, this approach enables adaptive, physically consistent optimization, thereby establishing a pathway toward autonomous, digital-twin-enabled discovery of HSMs.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一个集成数据基础设施、物理建模和AI逆设计的闭环框架，用于氢存储材料的自主发现，通过嵌入物理约束和实验反馈实现自适应优化。
AI.motivation: 氢存储材料的热力学、动力学和微观结构演化具有多尺度耦合特性，现有AI方法受限于数据碎片化、物理一致性不足以及与实验验证的弱集成。
AI.method: 提出了一个统一框架，整合了连贯的数据基础设施、物理基础建模和AI驱动的逆设计，形成闭环发现范式，嵌入物理约束和实验反馈。
AI.result: 该方法实现了自适应、物理一致的优化，建立了通往自主、数字孪生驱动的氢存储材料发现的路径。
AI.conclusion: 该闭环框架为氢存储材料的可扩展发现提供了可行的途径，有望突破氢能系统中的存储瓶颈。

title: From Knowledge to Action: Outcomes of the 2025 Large Language Model (LLM) Hackathon for Applications in Materials Science and Chemistry
comment: This paper reflects contributions from hundreds of researchers worldwide through an event, follow-on discussions, and project development exploring LLM applications in materials science and chemistry. While unconventional, it captures a timely, broad, and efficient community exploration of a rapidly evolving field and offers value to the arXiv community
summary: Large language models (LLMs) are rapidly changing how researchers in materials science and chemistry discover, organize, and act on scientific knowledge. This paper analyzes a broad set of community-developed LLM applications in an effort to identify emerging patterns in how these systems can be used across the scientific research lifecycle. We organize the projects into two complementary categories: Knowledge Infrastructure, systems that structure, retrieve, synthesize, and validate scientific information; and Action Systems, systems that execute, coordinate, or automate scientific work across computational and experimental environments. The submissions reveal a shift from single-purpose LLM tools toward integrated, multi-agent workflows that combine retrieval, reasoning, tool use, and domain-specific validation. Prominent themes include retrieval-augmented generation as grounding infrastructure, persistent structured knowledge representations, multimodal and multilingual scientific inputs, and early progress toward laboratory-integrated closed-loop systems. Together, these results suggest that LLMs are evolving from general-purpose assistants into composable infrastructure for scientific reasoning and action. This work provides a community snapshot of that transition and a practical taxonomy for understanding emerging LLM-enabled workflows in materials science and chemistry.

AI.tldr: 本文分析了材料科学和化学领域社区开发的大型语言模型（LLM）应用，将其分为知识基础设施和行动系统两类，揭示了从单一用途工具向集成化、多智能体工作流的转变趋势。
AI.motivation: 理解LLM在科学研究生命周期中如何被应用，识别新兴的使用模式，为科研社区提供系统性分类和洞察。
AI.method: 对社区开发的LLM应用进行广泛分析，将其归类为知识基础设施（结构化、检索、综合和验证科学信息）和行动系统（执行、协调或自动化计算与实验环境中的科学工作）两大互补类别。
AI.result: 发现了从单一用途LLM工具向集成化、多智能体工作流的转变；关键主题包括检索增强生成、持久结构化知识表示、多模态和多语言科学输入，以及实验室集成闭环系统的初步进展。
AI.conclusion: LLM正在从通用助手演变为可组合的科学推理与行动基础设施，本文提供了这一过渡期的社区快照和实用分类法。

title: Coupled phase transitions in crystalline solids with extreme chemical disorder
summary: Structural phase transitions often couple to magnetic and electronic degrees of freedom, enabling emergent phenomena in solids. In high-entropy oxides (HEOs), which typically stabilize in highly symmetric cubic phases, such transitions are considered rare due to the extreme chemical disorder-analogous to the behavior observed in high-entropy alloys. This raises a fundamental question: can the rich physics of coupled phase transitions persist in such disordered systems? Here, we show that targeted design of compositionally complex oxides (CCOs) can trigger symmetry-lowering transitions, with spinel-type materials serving as a representative case. For instance, [Mn$_{0.2}$Co$_{0.2}$Ni$_{0.2}$Cu$_{0.2}$Zn$_{0.2}$]Cr$_2$O$_4$, having two Jahn-Teller (J-T) active ions, undergoes two successive coupled structural transitions upon cooling: an orbital-driven transition at 100 K and a magnetism-driven transition at 40 K. Systematic substitution of $A$-site cations reveals that both Ni and Cu are essential for these transitions. Element specific local structure investigations uncover distinct and opposing local distortions around Ni and Cu, while Mn, Co, and Zn remain largely undistorted. These results establish that CCOs can host coupled phase transitions through `cooperation via competition' among local distortions in a chemically disordered lattice. This discovery expands the design principles for complex oxides, introducing a new paradigm for tuning structural and functional properties in high-entropy systems beyond conventional symmetry constraints.

AI.tldr: 本文展示了通过靶向设计成分复杂氧化物（CCOs），可以在高熵体系中实现对称性降低的结构相变。以尖晶石型[MnCoNiCuZn]Cr₂O₄为例，该材料在冷却时发生两次连续的耦合结构相变（100 K处的轨道驱动相变和40 K处的磁性驱动相变）。研究发现Ni和Cu是相变的关键元素，它们在晶格中产生截然相反的局域畸变，通过“竞争合作”机制驱动了耦合相变，打破了高熵体系中对称性限制的传统认知。
AI.motivation: 探明在极端化学无序的高熵氧化物中，是否仍然能够存在与磁性、电子自由度耦合的结构相变，从而回答这一基本科学问题。
AI.method: 通过靶向设计成分复杂氧化物（CCOs），以尖晶石型材料为代表，系统替换A位阳离子，结合元素特异性局域结构表征手段。
AI.result: 发现[MnCoNiCuZn]Cr₂O₄在冷却时发生两次耦合结构相变（100 K轨道驱动，40 K磁性驱动）；Ni和Cu对相变至关重要，且它们产生截然相反的局域畸变，而Mn、Co、Zn基本未畸变。
AI.conclusion: CCOs能够通过化学无序晶格中局域畸变的“竞争合作”机制来承载耦合相变，这一发现拓展了复杂氧化物的设计原则，为在高熵体系中调控结构和功能性质提供了新范式。

title: Energy dissipation at the atomic scale explains how fracture energy depends on crack velocity in silica glass
summary: The fracture energy of brittle materials rises with crack velocity, and this effect is typically attributed to surface roughening from path instabilities. Here we show, using molecular dynamics simulations of silica glass with a first-principles machine learned interatomic potential, that the structural fracture energy rises by up to 33 % already below the branching threshold, showing that fracture energy is not a constant material property. This rise in fracture energy is roughly equally partitioned between an increase in the intrinsic surface energy density and nanoscale roughening that increases the real fracture surface area. Results demonstrate that dynamic fracture in silica glass increases the fracture energy not merely by creating more apparent surface, but also by creating a fundamentally different surface at the nanoscale.

AI.tldr: 使用第一性原理机器学习势函数的分子动力学模拟发现，二氧化硅玻璃的断裂能在分支阈值以下就已增加高达33%，表明断裂能非常数。这一增加约等分为表面能密度提升和纳米级粗糙度增大所致。
AI.motivation: 传统认为脆性材料的断裂能随裂纹速度增加是由路径失稳导致的表面粗糙化引起，但断裂能是否本身为常数尚未明确。作者旨在探究在分支阈值以下，断裂能是否已发生变化及其微观机制。
AI.method: 采用第一性原理机器学习势函数进行二氧化硅玻璃的分子动力学模拟，分析裂纹速度低于分支阈值时的断裂能变化，并量化表面能密度和真实断裂表面积对断裂能增加的贡献。
AI.result: 断裂能在分支阈值以下已上升33%；该增加约一半源于表面能密度（材料固有属性）提升，另一半源于纳米级粗糙度导致的真实表面积增加。
AI.conclusion: 动态断裂不仅通过增加表观面积，还通过形成本质上不同的纳米级表面来提升断裂能，表明断裂能非常数。

title: Can phaseless auxiliary-field quantum Monte Carlo with broken symmetry trials describe iron-sulfur clusters?
summary: Phaseless auxiliary-field quantum Monte Carlo (AFQMC) has in several cases been found to perform well on strongly correlated systems. Here, we benchmark the method for three iron-sulfur clusters ([2Fe-2S], [4Fe-4S], and the FeMo cofactor) using a hierarchy of trial states derived from coupled cluster (CC) theory, including up to quadruple excitations, as well as multi-Slater trial states derived from the density matrix renormalization group. Our results reveal for these systems that, as the symmetry-broken trial is improved, the phaseless AFQMC energy can become less accurate, and in some cases even less accurate than the underlying trial projected energy, displaying an inverted energy pattern that is only corrected once the trial fidelity is sufficiently high. For [2Fe-2S], we show that this can coincide with a simultaneous improvement in the trial state and the walker ensemble. We further find that this is not solely due to the use of spin-unrestricted trial states, as the inversion persists in [2Fe-2S] when we explicitly break the symmetry of the Hamiltonian by applying a fictitious spin-Zeeman field. Instead, we find that the energy inversion is related to the choice of measurement trial, where using a high-order CC trial state for measurements may introduce errors that are suppressed when the measurement wave function is restricted to lower excitation subspaces. In particular, measuring the energy with the mean-field reference while guiding the walkers with a CC trial improves the overall accuracy across the iron-sulfur clusters, with a possible exception for [4Fe-4S]. Taken together, our findings suggest that the relatively accurate energies obtained with an HF trial state in these systems arise from favorable error cancellation, warranting significant caution about the reliability of phaseless AFQMC with such trials for strongly correlated transition-metal systems of this kind.

AI.tldr: 本文通过在三个铁硫簇（[2Fe-2S]、[4Fe-4S]和FeMo辅因子）上使用从耦合簇理论和密度矩阵重整化群导出的层次化尝试态，对无符号辅助场量子蒙特卡罗方法进行基准测试。研究发现，随着对称性破缺尝试态的改进，无符号AFQMC能量反而可能变得不准确，甚至比底层尝试态投影能量更差，出现"倒挂"能量模式。研究指出，使用HF尝试态获得的相对准确能量源于有利的误差抵消，对此类强相关过渡金属体系应保持谨慎。
AI.motivation: 评估无符号AFQMC在强相关体系（铁硫簇）中的表现，探究尝试态质量对方法准确性的影响。
AI.method: 使用CCSD、CCSDT、CCSDTQ等耦合簇理论以及DMRG导出的多斯莱特尝试态构建层次化尝试态，对[2Fe-2S]、[4Fe-4S]和FeMo辅因子进行基准测试，并引入自旋塞曼场检验对称性破缺的影响。
AI.result: 改进尝试态反而可能导致AFQMC能量变差，出现能量倒挂现象；该现象不是单纯由自旋非限制尝试态引起；能量倒挂与测量尝试态的选择有关，使用低阶测量尝试态可抑制误差；HF尝试态获得的准确能量源于误差抵消。
AI.conclusion: 对强相关过渡金属体系，使用HF尝试态的无符号AFQMC的准确性不可靠，需对误差抵消效应保持警惕。

title: Quantum Geometric Quadrupole of Cooper Pairs
summary: The size of Cooper pairs defines a fundamental length scale of superconductivity, conventionally set by band dispersion and the superconducting gap. This picture breaks down in flat bands, where quenched dispersion makes quantum geometry essential. Here we develop a general framework based on the Cooper pair quadrupole moment, whose trace gives the pair size. The framework holds for both dispersive and flat-band cases, and provides a unified description of the geometric origin of this length scale. In particular, when time-reversal symmetry is broken, Berry curvature enters through the phase structure of the pair wavefunction and gives an essential contribution absent from previous quantum-metric theories. Together, Berry curvature and quantum metric impose a geometric lower bound on the pair size. Applying this framework to rhombohedral graphene, we find that the Berry-curvature-induced contribution can dominate and yields pair sizes comparable to experimentally inferred coherence lengths. These results identify Berry curvature as a central geometric ingredient controlling the microscopic length scale of superconductivity.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了基于库珀对四极矩的统一理论框架，揭示了在平带超导体系中，贝里曲率与量子度量共同决定库珀对尺寸的几何下界，并在菱方石墨烯中验证了贝里曲率的显著贡献。
AI.motivation: 传统超导理论中库珀对尺寸由能带色散和超导能隙决定，但在平带体系中色散淬灭使得量子几何变得关键。现有量子度量理论不完整，缺乏对时间反演对称性破缺时贝里曲率作用的描述。
AI.method: 基于库珀对四极矩（其迹给出对尺寸）构建统一框架，同时适用于色散带和平带情形，揭示该长度尺度的几何起源，并推导出贝里曲率与量子度量共同作用的几何下界。
AI.result: 在时间反演对称破缺时，贝里曲率通过对波函数相位结构进入，贡献了先前量子度量理论所缺失的关键项。在菱方石墨烯中，贝里曲率诱导的贡献可占主导，产生的对尺寸与实验相干长度可比。
AI.conclusion: 贝里曲率是控制超导微观长度尺度的核心几何要素，为理解平带超导体系的物理性质提供了新的理论基础。

title: Tunable Odd-Parity Spin Splittings in Altermagnets
summary: Momentum-dependent spin splitting and its relation to inversion ($P$) and time-reversal ($T$) symmetries are central to nonrelativistic spintronics. Representative examples include collinear altermagnets with $(P,T)=(+,-)$ and non-collinear odd-parity magnets with $(P,T)=(-,+)$. In this work, we develop a theoretical framework to induce odd-parity spin splittings in the more abundant collinear altermagnets through two mechanisms: driving by a two-color linearly polarized light field or coupling to a $P$-odd loop-current order. Properly phase-locked two-color driving induces a static $(P,T)=(-,-)$ order, symmetry-equivalent to a translationally invariant $P$-odd loop-current order. Coupling this order to an altermagnet produces a controllable mixed-parity spin texture, opening new avenues for the electrical and optical manipulation of spin-polarized currents in spintronics applications. The same mechanism applied to a collinear $PT$-symmetric magnet induces a distinct $(P,T)=(+,+)$ state with a nonrelativistic dissipationless anomalous spin Hall conductivity. We present group-theory and microscopic Floquet theory to highlight the emergent responses.

AI.tldr: 本文提出在共线交变磁体中通过双色激光场或P-奇循环电流序诱导奇宇称自旋劈裂的理论框架，实现可控混合宇称自旋织构及非相对论性无耗散反常自旋霍尔效应。
AI.motivation: 共线交变磁体（P,T对称性为+,-）储量丰富，但缺乏奇宇称自旋劈裂；而已有奇宇称自旋劈裂存在于非共线奇宇称磁体（-,+）中。本文旨在将奇宇称自旋劈裂引入更普遍的共线交变磁体。
AI.method: 提出两种机制：(1) 双色线偏振光场驱动，产生静态(P,T)=(-,-)序，等价于平移不变的P-奇循环电流序；(2) 将这种P-奇序与交变磁体耦合。采用群论和微观Floquet理论分析。
AI.result: 实现了可控混合宇称自旋织构；在共线PT对称磁体中诱导出(P,T)=(+,+)态，产生非相对论性无耗散反常自旋霍尔电导。
AI.conclusion: 该机制为自旋电子学中自旋极化电流的电学和光学操控开辟了新途径。

title: Non-Markovian entropy production fluctuation theorem driven by a time-dependent electric field
summary: Fluctuation theorems are key to understanding both fundamental and applied aspects of non-equilibrium thermodynamics of small systems. We study the non-Markovian entropy production fluctuation theorem for the diffusion process of charged particles in a gas inside a harmonic potential and under the action of a time-dependent electric field, using a generalized Langevin equation. By considering the influence of the electric field on both the tagged Brownian particle and the bath particles, an "induced" electric force arises. Despite the additional force, we demonstrate that Kubo's second fluctuation-dissipation theorem (FDT) remains unchanged. The FDT allows us to obtain the Gaussian probability density for the position along a single stochastic trajectory, which is the key to demonstrating the validity of the detailed fluctuation theorem (DFT) for the total entropy production. We study the specific result of an Ornstein-Uhlenbeck-type friction memory kernel and an oscillating electric field, and analyze the average work and entropy production in different parameter regimes.

AI.tldr: 本文利用广义朗之万方程研究谐波势阱中带电粒子在时变电场作用下的非马尔可夫熵产生涨落定理，证明了即使存在诱导电场力，Kubo第二涨落-耗散定理保持不变，并基于此验证了总熵产生的详细涨落定理。
AI.motivation: 涨落定理对于理解小系统非平衡热力学至关重要，本文旨在将非马尔可夫熵产生涨落定理推广到带电粒子在气体中扩散并受时变电场影响的情形，考察电场对标记粒子和浴粒子的共同作用。
AI.method: 采用广义朗之万方程建模，考虑谐波势阱和时变电场；利用Kubo第二涨落-耗散定理推导单条随机轨迹上位置的高斯概率密度，从而证明详细涨落定理；以Ornstein-Uhlenbeck型摩擦记忆核和振荡电场为例进行具体分析。
AI.result: 发现电场会引入"诱导"电场力，但Kubo第二涨落-耗散定理形式不变；基于FDT得到的高斯概率密度成功证明了总熵产生的详细涨落定理；给出了特定记忆核和振荡电场下的平均功和熵产生在不同参数区间的具体结果。
AI.conclusion: 即使在非马尔可夫条件下，带电粒子扩散过程的总熵产生仍满足详细涨落定理，FDT的成立是证明该定理的关键；不同参数区间中平均功和熵产生的行为差异显著，丰富了非平衡热力学的理解。

title: Parafermionic and decoupled multicritical points in a frustrated $\mathbb{Z}_6$ clock chain
summary: We introduce a generalised six-state clock chain that interpolates between the clock and Potts models via a multicritical point described by decoupled Ising and three-state Potts models. We find that this decoupling extends into stable phases that break only $\mathbb{Z}_2$ or $\mathbb{Z}_3$ symmetry. We also use boundary CFT analysis and level spectroscopy to conclusively identify a $\mathbb{Z}_6$ parafermion multicritical point terminating the clock model Luttinger-liquid phase. Our work shows that parafermions emerge far from integrability, even in systems with intertwined Ising and three-state Potts orders.

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了一种广义六态时钟链模型，该模型通过多临界点连接时钟模型与Potts模型，该多临界点由解耦的Ising和三态Potts模型描述。研究发现这种解耦可延伸到稳定的相中，只破坏Z2或Z3对称性。通过边界CFT分析和能谱学，确定了终止时钟模型Luttinger-liquid相的Z6 parafermion多临界点。研究表明，即使在Ising和三态Potts序交织的系统中，parafermions也能在远离可积性的区域涌现。
AI.motivation: 研究六态时钟链模型中时钟模型与Potts模型之间的相互联系，探索parafermion在非可积系统中的涌现机制。
AI.method: 引入广义六态时钟链模型，结合边界共形场论（CFT）分析和能谱学方法。
AI.result: 发现通过多临界点可实现时钟模型与Potts模型的内插；解耦现象可延伸到仅破坏Z2或Z3对称性的稳定相；确认了Z6 parafermion多临界点的存在。
AI.conclusion: Parafermions可以在远离可积性的系统中涌现，即使在Ising和Potts序相互交织的复杂系统中也能出现。

title: Influence of twist angle on ultrafast charge separation in WS2-graphene heterostructures
summary: Van der Waals (vdW) heterostructures, formed by stacking two-dimensional materials, offer highly tunable electronic and optical properties, with the twist angle between layers acting as a critical tuning parameter. While its impact on moiré patterns, band structure, and correlated states is well-established, the influence of twist angle on ultrafast charge transfer remains controversial. Here, we employ time- and angle-resolved photoemission spectroscopy (trARPES) to directly probe ultrafast charge transfer in epitaxially grown WS\textsubscript{2}-graphene heterostructures with twist angles of 0$^{\circ}$ and 30$^{\circ}$. Upon photoexcitation at $\hbarω= 3.1\,\mathrm{eV}$, we observe efficient charge separation at 0$^{\circ}$, while at 30$^{\circ}$, electron and hole transfer occur at similar rates. Our results highlight the crucial role of the twist angle in controlling charge separation efficiency, offering valuable insights for designing vdW heterostructures for applications in photovoltaics and optoelectronics.

AI.tldr: 本文通过时间分辨角分辨光电子能谱(trARPES)直接观测了不同扭转角(0°和30°)的WS₂-石墨烯异质结中超快电荷转移过程，发现0°时电荷分离高效，而30°时电子和空穴转移速率相近，证实扭转角对电荷分离效率的关键调控作用。
AI.motivation: 扭转角对vdW异质结的莫尔条纹、能带结构和关联态的影响已较明确，但其对超快电荷转移的作用仍存在争议，亟需直接观测证据。
AI.method: 采用时间分辨角分辨光电子能谱(trARPES)技术，以外延生长WS₂-石墨烯异质结为模型体系，对比研究0°和30°扭转角下的超快电荷转移动力学。
AI.result: 在3.1 eV光激发下，0°扭转角异质结表现出高效的电荷分离，而30°扭转角下电子和空穴的转移速率几乎相同。
AI.conclusion: 扭转角是控制vdW异质结电荷分离效率的关键参数，这一发现对设计光伏和光电子器件具有重要意义。

title: Discovering Reaction Mechanisms with Transition Path Sampling-Based Active Learning of Machine-Learned Potentials
summary: Machine-learned interatomic potentials (MLPs) provide near density functional theory (DFT) accuracy at reduced computational cost, but their reliability depends on representative training data and often deteriorates in transition-state regions governing rare events. We introduce an active-learning framework in which Transition Path Sampling (TPS) serves as a targeted data-generation engine for constructing MLPs accurate in barrier regions. TPS generates ensembles of unbiased reactive trajectories, and a committee-based uncertainty estimate identifies configurations for selective DFT labeling and retraining. Iterating this cycle systematically refines the potential energy surface in dynamically relevant regions, without the need of prior knowledge of the mechanism. Applied to electrochemical CO$_2$ reduction to CO on copper in explicit water, the approach removes nonphysical artifacts present in early models, achieves near-DFT energy and force accuracy, and enables stable long-time sampling of reactive pathways. Extended TPS simulations reveal multiple dynamically accessible protonation mechanisms. This work establishes TPS as an efficient and principled active-learning strategy for reactive molecular simulations at electrochemical interfaces.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种主动学习框架，利用过渡路径采样（TPS）作为数据生成引擎，专门针对稀有事件的势垒区域构建高精度机器学习势函数（MLP），并将其成功应用于电化学CO₂还原反应，实现了近DFT精度和稳定长时间采样。
AI.motivation: 机器学习势函数在过渡态区域（控制稀有事件）的精度往往因训练数据代表性不足而下降，现有方法难以高效获取这些关键区域的准确数据。
AI.method: 将过渡路径采样（TPS）作为目标化数据生成引擎，通过委员会不确定性估计筛选构型进行DFT标注和重新训练，迭代优化势能面，无需先验反应机理知识。
AI.result: 消除了早期模型中的非物理伪影，达到了近DFT的能量和力精度，实现了反应路径的稳定长时间采样，并揭示了多个动力学可及的质子化机制。
AI.conclusion: 证明了TPS是一种高效且原理性的主动学习策略，可用于电化学界面反应分子模拟，为稀有事件的准确模拟提供了新范式。

title: Nb$_3$Sn Thin Films Using a Cu-Sn Route for Dark Matter Detection
comment: 211 pages, 83 figures, 6 tables, PhD dissertation submitted to Florida State University
summary:
Axion dark matter searches require superconducting radio-frequency (SRF) cavities on copper (Cu) substrates with quality factors Q > 10^5 in multi-tesla magnetic fields. Copper reduces thermal noise and allows complex geometries. Nb3Sn is a strong candidate due to its superior superconducting properties. However, uniform high-Tc Nb3Sn thin films on Cu are challenging due to Sn loss and substrate strain.
  This work uses solid-state diffusion of Sn from high-Sn Cu-Sn alloys into Nb layers to form Nb3Sn at Cu-compatible temperatures (650-750°C), avoiding the traditional ~1100°C vapor method. Varying Cu-Sn composition yielded an optimal alloy that maintains high Sn activity. Compositional and thermal expansion analyses showed Tc is suppressed below 18 K by Cu substrate strain. Experiments on Nb and sapphire substrates isolated the strain effects. Two routes were developed: (1) Cu-Sn on Ta-coated Cu with hot Nb sputtering (Tc = 16 K), and (2) Nb on Ta/Cu with Cu-Sn evaporation and ex-situ reaction. Route 2 gave uniform Nb3Sn and was chosen for cavity coating. A hexagonal cavity combining designs from the University of Washington and Center for Axion and Precision Physics was coated using Route 2 and tested to 50 mK and 9 T. At zero field it reached Q = 77,000 (40% above bare Cu's Q = 55,000), but Q dropped sharply in field. Nb3Sn coatings on Cu cavities outperform bare Cu at zero field and provide practical routes for improved axion detectors.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在铜基底上通过固态扩散法在低温（650-750°C）制备Nb₃Sn超导薄膜，用于轴子暗物质探测的SRF腔体。优化了Cu-Sn合金成分，分析了铜基底应变对超导转变温度的影响，开发了两种制备路线，并在六边形腔体上进行了测试。零场下Q值达77,000（优于纯铜），但磁场下Q值急剧下降。
AI.motivation: 轴子暗物质探测需要在高磁场环境下具有高质量因子Q > 10⁵的SRF腔体。铜基底可降低热噪声并实现复杂几何结构，Nb₃Sn因其优异超导性能是理想候选材料，但传统高温气相法（~1100°C）与铜基底不兼容，亟需开发低温制备均匀Nb₃Sn薄膜的方法。
AI.method: 采用固态扩散法，利用高Sn含量的Cu-Sn合金中的Sn扩散到Nb层中，在650-750°C（铜兼容温度）下形成Nb₃Sn。优化了Cu-Sn合金成分以维持高Sn活性。通过成分和热膨胀分析研究了铜基底应变对Tc的抑制效应，并在Nb和蓝宝石基底上进行对照实验。开发了两条路线：(1) Cu-Sn/Ta/Cu基底+热Nb溅射；(2) Nb/Ta/Cu基底+Cu-Sn蒸发+异位反应。选用路线2涂覆六边形组合腔体，在50 mK和9 T条件下测试。
AI.result: 路线2获得均匀Nb₃Sn薄膜。零场下腔体Q = 77,000，比纯铜的Q = 55,000提高40%。路线1的Tc = 16 K。但磁场下Q值急剧下降。铜基底应变使Tc被抑制在18 K以下。
AI.conclusion: 在铜基底上制备的Nb₃Sn涂层腔体在零场下性能优于纯铜，为改进轴子探测器提供了实用路线。但磁场下的性能退化仍需进一步优化。

title: Gauge-Field-Mediated Symmetry Breaking of Matters Under Electromagnetic Fields and Its Impact on Spin Dynamics
comment: 14 pages, 9 figures, contains Supplementary Information, submitted to Physical Review X
summary: When a condensed-matter system is subjected to external electromagnetic fields, the gauge-invariant formulation of physical operators must explicitly incorporate the gauge-field contribution. However, in the context of spin-orbit coupling (SOC), this gauge-field term is often regarded as negligible or merely additive compared to the canonical SOC, which is typically localized near atomic cores. Here, we demonstrate that the symmetry breaking and consequent spin dynamics are governed by the gauge-field term, without which the spins remain symmetry-constrained. We perform real-time time-dependent density functional theory calculations to investigate spin-orbit dynamics, focusing on representative cases with mirror, glide, and screw-rotational symmetry. We demonstrate that when the gauge-field term in the time-dependent Hamiltonian perturbs the symmetry of the canonical term, a dynamical spin state gradually develops during the time evolution, beyond the symmetry-frozen states. We suggest that, for nonequilibrium spin-orbit dynamics, the gauge-invariant formulation of SOC is not only formally required but also quantitatively essential, even for a weak external field.

AI.tldr: 本文证明在自旋-轨道耦合（SOC）系统中，电磁场作用下规范场项对自旋动力学起决定性作用，而非通常认为的可忽略项。通过实时含时密度泛函理论计算，发现规范场项会破坏规范SOC的对称性，从而驱动自旋动态演化，即使在外场较弱时也至关重要。
AI.motivation: 传统认为外电磁场下的规范场项在SOC系统中可忽略或仅为加性修正，但作者质疑这一假设，试图揭示规范场项对自旋动力学的真实影响。
AI.method: 采用实时含时密度泛函理论（rt-TDDFT）计算，研究具有镜像、滑移和螺旋旋转对称性的代表性体系中的自旋-轨道动力学。
AI.result: 发现规范场项会破坏规范SOC哈密顿量的对称性，导致自旋从对称性冻结态逐渐演化为动力学自旋态。即使外场很弱，这一效应也不可忽略。
AI.conclusion: 在非平衡自旋-轨道动力学中，规范不变形式的SOC不仅是形式上的要求，而且在定量上也是必要的，即使对外场较弱的体系也是如此。

title: Characterizing electronic scattering rates with transport in multiterminal devices
summary: Strongly interacting electrons in clean two-dimensional devices are theorized to exhibit many distinct transport regimes, such as ballistic, hydrodynamic, or diffusive. Realistic samples often lie in crossover regimes between these idealized limits. We show how a single experiment on a multiterminal device can distinguish these regimes and constrain the relevant scattering rates without space-resolved imaging. Using a linearized Boltzmann model in a five-terminal geometry, we find that current partition among the drain contacts diagnoses the ballistic-hydrodynamic-Ohmic crossover and allows extraction of momentum-relaxing and momentum-conserving scattering rates in the crossover regime. The same geometry also exhibits clear signatures of the tomographic regime, potentially allowing for a quantitative discrimination between viscous and tomographic flow in experiments. Our results demonstrate that multiterminal devices are a simpler experimental route to characterize transport regimes in electron liquids, relative to space-resolved imaging experiments.

AI.tldr: 本文展示了一种利用五端器件实验区分二维电子系统中弹道、流体动力学和欧姆输运 regimes 的方法，通过电流分配诊断并提取散射率，无需空间分辨成像。
AI.motivation: 强相互作用电子在二维器件中可能表现出多种输运 regime（弹道、流体动力学、扩散），但实际样品常处于这些理想极限之间的交叉区，且区分这些 regime 通常需要空间分辨成像实验，方法复杂。作者希望找到一种更简单的实验途径来区分这些输运 regime 并约束相关散射率。
AI.method: 使用线性化玻尔兹曼模型，在五端几何结构中分析电流在漏极之间的分配情况。通过电流分配诊断弹道-流体动力学-欧姆交叉区，并提取动量弛豫和动量守恒散射率。同时研究同一几何结构在断层成像（tomographic）regime 下的特征信号。
AI.result: 发现电流分配可以有效诊断弹道-流体动力学-欧姆交叉区，并能在交叉区提取动量弛豫和动量守恒散射率。五端几何结构还能显示断层成像 regime 的清晰特征，有望在实验中定量区分粘性流和断层成像流。
AI.conclusion: 多端器件为表征电子液体的输运 regime 提供了一种比空间分辨成像实验更简单的实验途径。

title: Universal criticality of entropy production in chemical reaction networks
summary: Stochastic thermodynamics gives universal relations for microscopic entropy production, yet its critical behavior at macroscopic nonequilibrium transitions remains unclassified. We study well-mixed reversible chemical reaction networks in the macroscopic-first limit, where transitions arise as local bifurcations of mass-action dynamics. Using linear-noise formulas, center-manifold normal forms, and Floquet theory, we obtain generic exponents for entropy-production fluctuations and responses at pitchfork, transcritical, saddle-node, and Hopf bifurcations. Beyond this low-order classification, a trajectory-space Cramér-Rao type bound yields the universal scaling inequality $α- 2β\geq 0$. Hence divergent responses require divergent fluctuations, but not conversely, making entropy-production fluctuations a sharper probe of nonequilibrium criticality.

AI.tldr: 该论文对远离平衡态的宏观相变中的熵产生临界行为进行了系统分类，通过线性噪声公式、中心流形规范型和Floquet理论，推导出不同分岔类型（pitchfork、transcritical、saddle-node、Hopf）下熵产生涨落与响应的普适标度指数，并利用轨迹空间的Cramér-Rao型不等式建立了标度关系α - 2β ≥ 0，表明熵产生涨落是非平衡临界性更灵敏的探针。
AI.motivation: 随机热力学已给出微观熵产生的普适关系，但宏观非平衡相变中熵产生的临界行为尚未被分类，本文旨在建立这一分类体系。
AI.method: 采用线性噪声公式、中心流形规范型理论和Floquet理论，对可逆化学反应网络的宏观极限进行分析，研究质量作用动力学局部分岔处的熵产生行为。
AI.result: 得到了pitchfork、transcritical、saddle-node和Hopf分岔下熵产生涨落与响应的普适标度指数，并推导出轨迹空间Cramér-Rao型不等式α - 2β ≥ 0。
AI.conclusion: 发散响应必然要求发散涨落，但反之不成立，因此熵产生涨落是非平衡临界性更灵敏的探针。

title: Universal Theory of Incoherent Metals
comment: Main text: 8 pages, 5 figures. Supplemental Material: 30 pages, 8 figures
summary: Numerous unconventional superconductors such as cuprates, heavy-fermions, and twisted-bilayer graphene exhibit incoherent metallic transport above the superconducting critical temperature. This phenomenon cannot be described with Fermi-liquid theory and has presented a significant theoretical challenge to overcome. We utilize the two-dimensional Yukawa-SYK model of fermions with spatially random coupling to quantum-critical bosons to study transport in a manner which is non-perturbative in the coupling strength. Our work provides a microscopic model of quantum-critical incoherent metals and their concomitant properties, including a non-Boltzmann transport formula between resistivity and quasi-particle lifetime, violation of the Mott-Ioffe-Regel resistivity bound, and violation of the Kovtun-Son-Starinets shear viscosity to entropy density bound.

AI.tldr: 本文利用二维Yukawa-SYK模型研究了量子临界非相干金属的输运性质，无需微扰论即可解释高温超导体的非费米液体行为，并预测了非玻尔兹曼输运公式、Mott-Ioffe-Regel电阻率界限和Kovtun-Son-Starinets剪切粘度-熵密度界限的违反。
AI.motivation: 铜氧化物、重费米子、扭曲双层石墨烯等非常规超导体在超导临界温度以上表现出非相干金属输运行为，费米液体理论无法描述这一现象，构成重大的理论挑战。
AI.method: 采用二维Yukawa-SYK模型，该模型描述费米子与量子临界玻色子之间具有空间随机耦合，以非微扰方式研究强耦合输运。
AI.result: 建立了量子临界非相干金属的微观模型，并展示了其伴随性质：非玻尔兹曼输运公式（电阻率与准粒子寿命的关系）、违反Mott-Ioffe-Regel电阻率上限、违反Kovtun-Son-Starinets剪切粘度与熵密度之比的下限。
AI.conclusion: 该工作为理解非常规超导体中非相干金属态的输运性质提供了微观理论基础，揭示了强关联体系中超越传统理论的普适行为。

title: Scale-Dependent Input Representation and Confidence Estimation for LLMs in Materials Property Prediction
comment: 14 pages, 4 figures, 7 pages of Supplementary Material
summary: Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly applied to materials science. However, the relationship between prediction accuracy, input representation, and model scale remains unclear, and reliable methods for assessing prediction confidence have not yet been established. In this study, we fine-tune two Llama models of different scales (1B and 8B) using low-rank adaptation (LoRA) on an inorganic crystal structure dataset. We systematically evaluate five input representations, namely chemical composition, crystal summary, local environment description, full text description, and crystallographic information files (CIF), for formation energy and bandgap prediction. Our results show that the optimal input representation depends on model scale. The 1B model performs better with compact representations, whereas the 8B model maintains high accuracy even with longer natural-language descriptions and CIF inputs. Across both model scales, crystal summaries that include space-group information consistently outperform composition-only inputs, indicating that symmetry information serves as a robust and informative feature. We further analyze the relationship between prediction error and the mean negative log-likelihood (mean NLL) of tokens corresponding to predicted numerical values. While no clear correlation is observed in base models, fine-tuned models exhibit a consistent trend in which lower mean NLL corresponds to smaller prediction errors. This result suggests that mean NLL can serve as a practical confidence indicator without requiring additional training. These findings demonstrate that both input representation and model scale play critical roles in LLM-based materials property prediction, and that mean NLL provides an effective and computationally efficient measure of prediction confidence.

AI.tldr: 本文微调了不同规模的Llama模型（1B和8B），系统评估了五种输入表示对材料性质预测的影响，发现最优输入表示依赖于模型规模，并提出平均负对数似然（mean NLL）可作为有效的预测置信度指标。
AI.motivation: 大语言模型在材料科学中的应用日益广泛，但预测精度、输入表示与模型规模之间的关系尚不明确，且缺乏可靠的预测置信度评估方法。
AI.method: 使用LoRA微调Llama 1B和8B模型，在无机晶体结构数据集上系统比较五种输入表示（化学成分、晶体摘要、局域环境描述、全文描述、CIF），并分析mean NLL与预测误差的关系。
AI.result: 1B模型在紧凑表示下表现更好，8B模型在长文本和CIF输入下仍保持高精度；包含空间群信息的晶体摘要优于纯成分输入；微调后模型的mean NLL与预测误差呈现一致相关性。
AI.conclusion: 输入表示和模型规模对基于LLM的材料性质预测至关重要，mean NLL可作为无需额外训练的高效置信度指标。

title: Selecting optimal unrestricted Hartree-Fock trial wavefunctions for phaseless auxiliary-field quantum Monte Carlo: Accuracy and limitations in modeling three iron-sulfur clusters
summary: Phaseless auxiliary-field quantum Monte Carlo (ph-AFQMC) has emerged as a promising electronic structure method for correlated electronic systems. However, the quality of its predictions depends critically on the choice of trial wavefunction, and it is not obvious how to make an optimal choice especially for strongly correlated states of large systems. Mean-field wavefunctions are compelling trial wavefunction candidates as they map directly to chemical concepts and can be obtained with $O(N^4)$ cost. Yet in the strongly correlated regime one faces a symmetry dilemma and the existence of multiple nearly-degenerate solutions. In this work we investigate active space models of [2Fe-2S]$^{2+}$, mixed-valent [4Fe-4S]$^{2+}$, and [4Fe-4S]$^{4+}$ and explore the sensitivity of ph-AFQMC to the choice of unrestricted Hartree-Fock trial wavefunction. We find that chemical properties and physical symmetries, rather than the variational energy, ought to guide the choice of mean-field trial for ph-AFQMC (or reference state for coupled cluster models), and show that surprisingly accurate ground-state energies for these systems can be obtained. However, in all cases we find a rapidly vanishing overlap between the stochastic wavefunction and the UHF trial, indicating that the trials are suboptimal importance functions. By analogy to a similar situation in the stretched helium dimer cation, we show how this sampling bias pushes ph-AFQMC towards artificially negative energies, which evidently can be compensated for by the phaseless bias in certain cases.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了phaseless auxiliary-field quantum Monte Carlo (ph-AFQMC)方法在强相关铁硫簇（[2Fe-2S]²⁺、[4Fe-4S]²⁺、[4Fe-4S]⁴⁺）中的表现，发现应基于化学性质和物理对称性而非变分能量来选择无限制Hartree-Fock试探波函数，并揭示了试探波函数与随机波函数之间重叠快速衰减导致的人工负能量偏差问题。
AI.motivation: ph-AFQMC的预测质量高度依赖于试探波函数的选择，但对于强关联大体系，如何最优选择并不明确。平均场波函数虽具计算优势，但在强关联区域面临对称性困境和多近简并解的问题，亟需系统研究其选择准则。
AI.method: 以活性空间模型研究[2Fe-2S]²⁺、混合价[4Fe-4S]²⁺和[4Fe-4S]⁴⁺体系，系统评估ph-AFQMC对无限制Hartree-Fock (UHF)试探波函数选择的敏感性，并与拉伸氦二聚体阳离子的情况进行类比分析。
AI.result: 化学性质和物理对称性比变分能量更适合指导UHF试探选择；可获得惊人准确的基态能量；但所有体系均发现随机波函数与UHF试探的重叠快速衰减至零，表明试探并非最优重要性函数；这种采样偏差导致ph-AFQMC倾向于人工负能量，在特定情况下可被phaseless偏差补偿。
AI.conclusion: 选择ph-AFQMC的平均场试探时应优先考虑化学性质与物理对称性而非能量；需警惕试探波函数与随机波函数重叠消失导致的系统性偏差。

title: First-Order Transitions in Weak Ising Spin-Orbit-Coupled Superconductors
summary: Ising spin-orbit coupling (ISOC) can strongly protect superconductivity against exchange-field-induced depairing, typically leading to critical fields far exceeding the Pauli limit and continuous (second-order) phase transitions. Here, using a free-energy approach, we demonstrate that first-order transitions can emerge in superconductors with weak ISOC under large exchange fields. In this regime, conventional theoretical approaches based on the gap equation fail to determine the thermodynamic critical field and instead yield only the supercooling field. Moreover, we identify two pronounced in-gap coherence peaks in the quasiparticle spectra, which represent the weak-ISOC manifestation of the previously reported mirage-gap states. Our results establish the importance of free-energy analysis in describing the first-order phase transitions in Ising superconductors and reveal distinct spectroscopic signatures of the weak-ISOC regime.

AI.tldr: 该论文发现，在弱伊辛自旋轨道耦合（ISOC）超导体中，大交换场可导致一级相变，传统能隙方程方法仅能给出过冷场而无法确定热力学临界场，并揭示了弱ISOC区域特有的准粒子谱中两个显著带内相干峰（幻影能隙态的表现）。
AI.motivation: 现有理论多关注强ISOC对超导的保护作用（导致连续二级相变），但弱ISOC在大交换场下的相变行为尚不清楚，传统能隙方程方法存在局限性。
AI.method: 采用自由能分析方法，研究弱ISOC超导体在大交换场下的相变行为，并与传统能隙方程方法进行对比。
AI.result: 弱ISOC下可发生一级相变；传统能隙方程只能给出过冷场而非热力学临界场；发现了两个带内相干峰（弱ISOC版本的幻影能隙态）。
AI.conclusion: 自由能分析对描述伊辛超导体中的一级相变至关重要，同时揭示了弱ISOC区域独特的光谱特征。

title: Beam canalization by a non-Abelian gauge field
summary: Hyperbolic and quasi-flat isofrequency contours (IFCs) are used for beam canalization and can be created by tilted Dirac points in photonic systems. Dirac points in microcavities are generated by the combination of transverse-electric/transverse-magnetic splitting and linear birefringence. We show that the canalization is here strongly assisted by the coupling between the spatial dynamics and polarization pseudospin precession. This dynamics is well described analytically and numerically as the action of a non-Abelian gauge field on emergent charges (spin current). We demonstrate a ten-fold enhancement of the canalization for a Gaussian beam by the gauge field, as compared to a description based solely on the group velocity associated with the IFCs.

AI.tldr: 本文研究微腔中狄拉克点产生的双曲和准平等频轮廓用于光束通道化，发现非阿贝尔规范场与赝自旋耦合可显著增强通道化效果，相比仅基于群速度的描述提升约10倍。
AI.motivation: 探索如何利用微腔中倾斜狄拉克点产生的特殊等频轮廓实现光束通道化，并揭示其中非阿贝尔规范场对通道化增强的作用机制。
AI.method: 通过解析和数值方法分析空间动力学与偏振赝自旋进动之间的耦合，将系统描述为作用于自旋电流上的非阿贝尔规范场。
AI.result: 发现了非阿贝尔规范场对高斯光束通道化有十倍增强效果，显著优于仅基于等频轮廓群速度的传统描述。
AI.conclusion: 微腔中狄拉克点驱动的通道化不能仅用等频轮廓解释，必须考虑非阿贝尔规范场与自旋电流的耦合机制。

title: From Enhanced Sampling to Human-Readable Representations of Protein Dynamics
summary: Understanding protein conformational dynamics is essential for elucidating biological function but remains challenging due to the wide range of timescales and the complexity of collective motions. Enhanced sampling methods overcome timescale limitations of conventional molecular dynamics, yet their effectiveness depends on the choice of collective variables (CVs), which are often difficult to define and may lack physical interpretability. In particular, collective variables derived from machine learning or collective vibrational modes can efficiently capture slow dynamics but are not easily mapped onto intuitive structural descriptors. Here, we present a fully automated framework that transforms enhanced sampling trajectories into human-readable representations of protein dynamics. Our approach combines enhanced sampling along CVs derived from frequency-selective anharmonic mode analysis with a post hoc analysis of biased trajectories using weighted dynamic cross-correlation matrices. From these, we identify residue pairs and domains exhibiting correlated and anti-correlated motions, yielding simple domain-domain distances that serve as physically interpretable CVs. We apply this method to five proteins, including KRAS and HIV-1 protease, and show that it consistently identifies biologically relevant domains and motions without prior system-specific knowledge. Projection onto these distances produces free energy surfaces that reproduce known conformational states with low statistical uncertainty while maximizing independent dynamical information. This workflow enables systematic recasting of complex CVs into simple geometric descriptors without loss of essential dynamics. Its generality and automation make it broadly applicable for interpreting enhanced sampling simulations and generating interpretable conformational ensembles for integration with emerging machine learning approaches.

AI.tldr: 提出一个自动化框架，将增强采样轨迹转化为人类可读的蛋白质动力学表示。该方法结合频率选择性非简谐模式分析的CV与加权动态交叉相关矩阵的后处理，识别残基对和结构域，生成物理可解释的几何描述符（如域间距离），并在五种蛋白质（包括KRAS和HIV-1蛋白酶）上验证了其有效性。
AI.motivation: 蛋白质构象动力学对理解生物功能至关重要，但传统增强采样方法依赖难以定义且缺乏物理可解释性的集体变量（CVs）。特别是机器学习或集体振动模式衍生的CV虽能捕捉慢动力学，却难以映射到直观的结构描述符上。
AI.method: 结合频率选择性非简谐模式分析（FSA）的CV进行增强采样，然后对偏置轨迹进行加权动态交叉相关矩阵（wDCCM）后处理，识别相关/反相关运动的残基对和结构域，最终提取简单的域间距离作为可解释CV。
AI.result: 在五个蛋白质（KRAS、HIV-1蛋白酶等）上验证，无需先验系统知识即可一致识别生物相关的结构域和运动。将轨迹投影到这些距离上产生的自由能面能以低统计不确定性再现已知构象状态，同时最大化独立动力学信息。
AI.conclusion: 该工作流能系统地将复杂CV重塑为简单几何描述符而不丢失关键动力学信息，其通用性和自动化使其广泛适用于增强采样模拟的解释，并能与新兴的机器学习方法集成生成可解释的构象系综。

title: Spin-orbital exchange as a route to intertwined dipole-quadrupole orbital order in MnV$_2$O$_4$ under strong trigonal crystal field
comment: 12 pages, 6 figures, and Supplemental Materials (9 pages, 2 figures)
summary: Orbitally degenerate systems provide a promising platform for realizing novel quantum phases driven by spin-orbital exchange interactions, as described by the Kugel-Khomskii model. Spinel vanadates, in which orbital degrees of freedom remain active, exhibit structural and magnetic transitions accompanied by orbital ordering, but the nature of the orbital state in MnV$_2$O$_4$ remains under debate. Here, we combine first-principles calculations with an effective spin-orbital model to address this problem. We show that a significant trigonal crystal field is present in high-temperature cubic phase and plays an essential role in determining the low-energy degrees of freedom. Based on the resulting parameters, we construct an effective Hamiltonian beyond the conventional dominant-hopping approximation and demonstrate that subdominant hopping processes strongly modify the spin-orbital exchange interactions. As a result, the system stabilizes a two-in/two-out magnetic configuration featuring spin canting and intertwined dipole-quadrupole orbital order.

AI.tldr: 本文通过第一性原理计算和有效自旋-轨道模型，揭示了MnV₂O₄中三角晶场和次主导跃迁过程对自旋-轨道交换作用的关键影响，稳定了具有自旋倾斜和偶极-四极轨道序的两进两出磁结构。
AI.motivation: 轨道简并系统（如尖晶石钒酸盐MnV₂O₄）中存在轨道有序引发的结构和磁相变，但MnV₂O₄中轨道态的本质尚存争议，亟需澄清。
AI.method: 将第一性原理计算与有效自旋-轨道模型相结合，构建超越常规主导跃迁近似的有效哈密顿量。
AI.result: 高温立方相中存在显著的三角晶场，决定低能自由度；次主导跃迁过程强烈修正自旋-轨道交换作用，最终稳定两进两出磁构型，伴随自旋倾斜与偶极-四极轨道序。
AI.conclusion: 三角晶场和次主导跃迁是理解MnV₂O₄轨道态的关键，该工作为轨道简并系统中新奇量子相的探索提供了理论依据。

title: Adjacent Sink Strengths Used in Multiscale Kinetic Rate Equation Simulations of Defects and Impurities in Solids
summary: Kinetic Rate Equation (kRE) modeling is widely used to simulate defect and impurity evolution in solids over experimentally relevant time and length scales. However, conventional kRE formulations include only random-position sink strengths, which adequately describe trapping of defects created at random lattice sites but fail to capture the enhanced retrapping of defects released directly adjacent to traps during detrapping or dissociation events. This omission leads to systematic errors, including underestimated thermal desorption (TDS) peak temperatures and incorrect kinetic parameters when fitting to experimental data. In this work, we derive for the first time analytical expressions for the adjacent sink strength, including correction for finite impurity diffusion jump length. We provide a practical implementation strategy for integrating these expressions into kRE simulations. Comparisons with kinetic Monte Carlo (kMC) benchmarks demonstrate that adjacent sink strengths dominate the retrapping probability and are essential for reproducing the correct temperature dependence of TDS release peaks. Simulations that employ only random sink strengths can still be tuned to match TDS spectra; however, the resulting fitted trapping energies, detrapping frequencies, and diffusion parameters are often physically inconsistent. The adjacent sink strength formulation introduced here significantly improves the predictive capability of kRE modeling, enabling accurate multiscale simulations of defect and impurity behavior in materials. This framework also establishes a foundation for future extensions, including adjacent sink strengths associated with extended defects such as dislocations and grain boundaries, offering new opportunities to resolve persistent discrepancies between experimental and simulated trapping energetics.

AI.tldr: 本文首次推导了相邻陷阱汇聚强度的解析表达式，解决了传统速率方程模型因忽略相邻陷阱效应而导致的热脱附峰温低估和动力学参数失真的问题，显著提升了kRE模拟的预测能力。
AI.motivation: 传统kRE模型仅考虑随机位置陷阱汇聚强度，无法描述缺陷从陷阱释放时紧邻陷阱的增强再捕获效应，导致热脱附峰温系统性地被低估，且拟合出的动力学参数物理上不一致。
AI.method: 首次推导了相邻陷阱汇聚强度的解析表达式，并考虑了有限杂质扩散跳跃长度的修正；提出了将该表达式集成到kRE模拟中的实用策略。
AI.result: 与kMC基准对比表明，相邻陷阱汇聚强度主导了再捕获概率，是复现TDS释放峰正确温度依赖性的关键；仅使用随机陷阱强度的模拟虽可拟合TDS谱，但所得参数物理上不一致。
AI.conclusion: 相邻陷阱汇聚强度公式显著提升了kRE建模的预测能力，为缺陷和杂质行为的精确多尺度模拟奠定了基础，并可为未来扩展至位错、晶界等扩展缺陷提供支持。

title: Nonuniform superconducting states from Majorana flat bands
summary: Zero-energy flat bands within the superconducting gap can give rise to competing ordered phases. We investigate such phases in topological superconductors based on the magnetic adatom platform hosting a flat band of Majorana edge states. Our self-consistent calculations of the superconducting order parameter show the emergence of both a pair density wave with edge-localized amplitude modulations and a phase crystal characterized by edge-localized phase modulations. These two phases lower the free energy of the system by gapping out the Majorana flat band, as dictated by winding numbers, which are primarily tuned by the chemical potential. In fact, at zero temperature the uniform superconducting solution with Majorana flat band never survives and the phase diagram features a pair density wave, while the order parameter transitions into a phase crystal when amplitude modulations are insufficient to hybridize all the Majorana states. A broad intermediate region connects these two phases with comparable modulations in both amplitude and phase. At finite temperatures, the pair density wave survives up to around 80% of the bulk superconducting transition temperature, while the phase crystal only appears at lower temperatures and the intermediate region is strongly suppressed. Our findings establish the ubiquity of emergent nonuniform superconducting phases and their temperature-dependent behavior in topological superconductors.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了磁性原子平台拓扑超导体中马约拉纳平带导致的竞争有序相，通过自洽计算发现边缘局域的配对密度波和相晶体两种非均匀超导相，它们通过打开能隙降低系统自由能，相图由化学势和温度调控。
AI.motivation: 探究拓扑超导体中超导能隙内的零能平带如何引发竞争有序相，特别是马约拉纳边缘态平带导致的非均匀超导相及其物理机制。
AI.method: 对超导序参量进行自洽计算，分析化学势和温度对相图的影响，通过绕数（winding numbers）刻画不同相的拓扑性质。
AI.result: 发现两种非均匀超导相：边缘局域振幅调制的配对密度波和相位调制的相晶体；零温下均匀超导解不存在，相图以配对密度波为主；配对密度波可存活至约80%体超导转变温度，相晶体仅出现在低温区。
AI.conclusion: 建立了拓扑超导体中非均匀超导相及其温度依赖行为的普遍性，揭示了马约拉纳平带对超导序的竞争和调控机制。

title: Bogoliubov mode dynamics and non-adiabatic transitions in time-varying condensed media
summary: This study investigates non-adiabatic wave dynamics in condensed media and the transition from adiabatic stability to spectral chaos. We introduce a dimensionless parameter, as a universal metric to quantify phase-mode redistribution at sub-wavelength inhomogeneities. Our framework treats defects as localized sites of adiabaticity violation triggering non-adiabatic parametric excitation of the ground state. Numerical validation in an expanded 50-level bosonic basis demonstrates that the framework accurately distinguishes between adiabatic regimes in ENZ-metamaterials and non-adiabatic transitions in ultrafast magnetic media. We establish a universal scaling law governed by the non-adiabaticity-to-regulation ratio, proving that the proposed metric remains a robust metrological tool for identifying sub-wavelength inhomogeneities across diverse material classes. Computational singularities observed at extreme loads identify the rigorous operational boundaries for coherent mode-mixing. The robustness of the proposed framework is numerically validated, proving the method's reliability for a wide class of non-linear condensed media satisfying the stability criterion. This result provides a rigorous physical justification for the dynamic Hilbert space truncation (effective fermion-like dynamics), ensuring metrological consistency in complex structural environments. These results provide a theoretical foundation for probing ultrafast collective excitations and latent internal stresses, extending structural analysis beyond the traditional diffraction barrier.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个无量纲参数作为通用度量，量化亚波长不均匀性中的相位模式重分布，揭示了从绝热稳定性到光谱混沌的转变，并在50级玻色子基中验证了该框架的有效性。
AI.motivation: 研究凝聚态介质中的非绝热波动力学，特别是从绝热稳定性到光谱混沌的转变机制，为超越传统衍射极限的亚波长结构分析提供理论基础。
AI.method: 引入无量纲参数作为通用度量，将缺陷视为绝热性破坏的局域位点，引发基态的非绝热参量激发；在扩展的50级玻色子基中进行数值验证。
AI.result: 框架能准确区分ENZ超材料中的绝热区域与超快磁性介质中的非绝热转变；建立了由非绝热-调控比控制的普适标度律；在极端载荷下观察到计算奇异性，明确了相干模式混合的严格操作边界。
AI.conclusion: 该度量是识别亚波长不均匀性的稳健计量工具；为动态希尔伯特空间截断（有效费米子动力学）提供了严格物理依据；为探测超快集体激发和潜在内应力提供了理论框架。

title: Optimal Navigation in Stochastic and Disordered Gridworlds
summary: Navigation in complex and noisy environments is a key issue in diverse fields from biology to engineering. Despite extensive progress in numerical optimization methods for computing navigation policies, insights into how disorder reshapes optimal navigation remain elusive. To address this question, we investigate the navigation of a Brownian particle in a disordered energy landscape, modeled as a lattice with randomly distributed traps. Using dynamic programming, we compute the optimal navigation policies that minimize the mean first-passage time to a target site. To quantify the impact of disorder, we introduce a density of change from a Kullback-Leibler divergence, which captures how the optimal policy is reshaped by either the presence of disorder or the knowledge of its configuration. Our results reveal a non-monotonic dependence of the change of the policy on trap concentration, with a pronounced maximum. In the fluctuation-dominated regime where the navigation bias is weak, we derive an analytical expression for the density of change, and demonstrate that the maximum occurs unexpectedly at low trap concentrations.

AI.tldr: 本文通过动态规划方法研究布朗粒子在含随机陷阱的无序能量景观中的最优导航策略，发现策略变化与陷阱浓度呈非单调关系，且在弱偏置涨落主导区出现反常低浓度峰值。
AI.motivation: 现有数值优化方法虽能计算导航策略，但无序性如何重塑最优导航的内在机制尚不清晰，需理论框架量化无序对策略的影响。
AI.method: 将无序能量景观建模为含随机陷阱的晶格，利用动态规划求解最小化平均首达时间的最优导航策略；引入基于Kullback-Leibler散度的"变化密度"量化策略偏移程度。
AI.result: 策略变化随陷阱浓度呈非单调关系，存在显著峰值；在涨落主导（弱偏置）区域，推导出变化密度的解析表达式，且峰值出现在低陷阱浓度这一反直觉区域。
AI.conclusion: 无序性对最优导航策略的塑造具有非平凡特征，低浓度陷阱即可显著改变策略，为理解复杂环境中导航行为提供了新见解。

title: Transition Metal Dichalcogenide Excitons in Periodic Electrostatic Potentials: Center-of-Mass Models
summary: Two-dimensional (2D) van-der-Waals materials are a promising platform for exciton state engi- neering. In this paper, we study the properties of excitons in 2D group VI transition-metal dichalco- genide (TMD) semiconductors that are modified by a periodic electrostatic potential through the quadratic Stark effect. Using a model that retains only center-of-mass and valley degrees-of-freedom, we find that electrostatic potentials can drive optical valley splitting up to 10meVs and induce valley selective exciton dispersion. We explain why both properties are sensitive to the rotational symmetry of the electrostatic trapping potential using a combination of numerical results and an- alytical approximations. An important consequence of valley-splitting is that the lowest exciton band is non-degenerate and has a linear dispersion around gamma that is expected to suppress thermal excitations, allowing true Bose condensation and superfluidity of excitons in two space dimensions.

AI.tldr: 本文研究二维TMD半导体中激子在周期性静电势（斯塔克效应）下的性质，发现静电势可产生高达10meV的光学谷劈裂和谷选择性激子色散，且这些性质对势阱的旋转对称性敏感。最低激子能带为非简并且具有线性色散，有望抑制热激发，实现二维激子的玻色凝聚和超流。
AI.motivation: 探索二维过渡金属硫族化物（TMD）半导体中，通过周期性静电势（利用二次斯塔克效应）调控激子态的可能性，特别是实现光学谷劈裂和谷选择性激子色散。
AI.method: 建立仅保留质心和谷自由度的简化模型，结合数值计算与解析近似，研究静电势的旋转对称性对谷劈裂和激子色散的影响。
AI.result: 静电势可实现高达10meV的光学谷劈裂，诱导谷选择性激子色散；谷劈裂和色散对静电势阱的旋转对称性敏感；最低激子能带非简并且在伽马点附近具有线性色散。
AI.conclusion: 该机制有望抑制热激发，使得在二维空间中实现激子的真实玻色凝聚和超流成为可能。

title: Thermal bottleneck in a freely suspended superconducting island on InAs nanowire
summary: We investigate the heat balance in superconducting islands (S-islands) formed in epitaxial Al/InAs nanowires (NWs) freely suspended above the substrate. We employ a Joule spectroscopy approach, which traces the superconductor-normal transition in the S-island mediated by heating of the neighboring InAs NW segments via transport current. The temperature of the surrounding 3He bath is varied with nearby mesoscopic heaters and controlled with the NW Johnson noise thermometry. The experiment reveals a substantial thermal relaxation bottleneck associated with the cooling via surrounding 3He, which gives rise to phonon heating in the S-island. Our results uncover the role of environmental cooling in non-equilibrium experiments in S-islands in NW devices.

AI.tldr: 研究超导岛（S-island）在悬浮InAs纳米线中的热平衡，发现周围3He冷却存在显著热弛豫瓶颈，导致声子加热效应。
AI.motivation: 探究超导岛在纳米线器件中的热平衡机制，特别是环境冷却对非平衡实验的影响。
AI.method: 采用Joule能谱方法追踪超导-正常态转变，利用邻近介观加热器改变3He浴温度，并用Johnson噪声测温进行控制。
AI.result: 发现3He冷却存在显著热弛豫瓶颈，导致S-island中声子加热。
AI.conclusion: 揭示了环境冷却在纳米线器件超导岛非平衡实验中的关键作用。

title: Information-Geometric Signatures of Nonconservative Driving
summary: We propose an information-geometric signature of nonconservative driving that detects violations of detailed balance using the Kullback--Leibler divergence and the Fisher information. For Markov jump processes satisfying detailed balance, we show that, near equilibrium, the acceleration of the Kullback--Leibler divergence relative to the equilibrium state is given by twice the Fisher information with respect to time. In contrast, for relaxation toward a nonequilibrium steady state, this relation is generally violated even near the steady state. We refer to the resulting discrepancy as the relaxation gap and derive a lower bound on the steady-state entropy production rate in terms of this gap. We demonstrate that this bound is particularly tight for networks with simple cyclic topologies. Finally, we show that analogous relations and bounds hold for Fokker--Planck dynamics.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于信息几何的非保守驱动特征，利用KL散度和Fisher信息检测详细平衡的违反。对于满足详细平衡的马尔可夫跳跃过程，近平衡时KL散度相对于平衡态的加速度等于两倍的时间Fisher信息。而对于非平衡稳态的弛豫，即使在近稳态时该关系也被违反，作者将此偏差定义为弛豫间隙，并推导了稳态熵产生率的下界。
AI.motivation: 现有方法难以有效检测远离平衡态系统中详细平衡的违反情况，作者希望开发一种基于信息几何的通用工具来量化非保守驱动，并与熵产生率建立联系。
AI.method: 利用KL散度和Fisher信息作为信息几何工具，分析马尔可夫跳跃过程和Fokker-Planck动力学中详细平衡的违反情况；定义弛豫间隙作为非平衡特征，并推导其与熵产生率的下界关系。
AI.result: 发现近平衡条件下满足详细平衡时KL散度加速度与Fisher信息的精确关系；在非平衡稳态附近该关系被违反，产生弛豫间隙；推导了弛豫间隙约束熵产生率的下界，该下界在简单循环网络中尤为紧致；结论同样适用于Fokker-Planck动力学。
AI.conclusion: 信息几何方法能够有效刻画非平衡驱动，弛豫间隙为检测和量化非平衡稳态中的耗散提供了新的理论工具。

title: Nature of magnetism in bilayer nickelate La3Ni2O7 single crystals
summary: The recent discovery of high-temperature superconductivity in pressurized and thin film nickelates has generated intense interest, yet the nature of magnetism in their ambient-pressure parent phases remains poorly understood, despite its potentially crucial role in pairing. Here we use neutron scattering to resolve the spin order and dynamics of single-crystalline La3Ni2O7, an ambient-pressure parent of this class. Well defined spin excitations are observed at Q = (0, 0.5, 2.5), featuring a~5 meV spin gap and anisotropic in-plane dispersions, with zone-boundary softening along the transverse direction indicative of competing exchange interactions. The excitations exhibit pronounced out-of-plane modulations with bilayer periodicity, providing direct evidence for antiferromagnetic interlayer coupling. Their dispersion is well described by a bilayer Heisenberg Hamiltonian with strong interlayer exchange and competing in-plane couplings within a stripe-type magnetic order. Normalization of the spectra to absolute units reveals that, although the spin-wave bandwidth is only about 25% of that in cuprates, the local dynamic susceptibility at comparable energies is significantly enhanced, yielding a total fluctuating moment of comparable magnitude. These results highlight intense mid-energy spin excitations rooted in substantial electronic correlations as a defining feature of this family, establishing a magnetic framework distinct from cuprates and directly relevant to understanding superconductivity in this system.

AI.tldr: 本文通过中子散射技术解析了环境压力下镍基超导母体La3Ni2O7单晶的自旋序和动力学，发现其具有~5 meV自旋隙、各向异性面内色散、双层周期调制的层间反铁磁耦合等特征，自旋激发可用双层海森堡模型描述，局域动态磁化率显著增强但自旋波带宽仅为铜氧化物的25%，表明该体系具有强烈的电子关联和不同于铜氧化物的磁性框架。
AI.motivation: 高压和薄膜镍基超导体的发现引发关注，但其环境压力母相的磁性本质尚不清楚，而磁性可能在配对机制中起关键作用，因此需要澄清其磁序和自旋动力学。
AI.method: 使用中子散射技术测量单晶La3Ni2O7的自旋序和动力学，并结合双层海森堡哈密顿量模型对色散进行理论描述，同时将谱归一化到绝对单位进行定量分析。
AI.result: 观察到Q=(0,0.5,2.5)处有明确自旋激发，自旋隙约5 meV，面内色散各向异性且沿横向有带边界软化；激发具有双层周期性的显著面外调制；自旋波带宽仅为铜氧化物的25%，但局域动态磁化率显著增强，总涨落磁矩可比拟。
AI.conclusion: 该体系具有强烈的电子关联和强烈的中能自旋激发，建立了不同于铜氧化物的磁性框架，对理解该体系的超导机制具有直接意义。

title: Pressure induced Electronic and Structural Transition in Ba$_2$NiTeO$_6$
summary: This study explores the pressure evolution of the double perovskite Ba$_2$NiTeO$_6$ by employing experimental and computational techniques. For the study of structural and vibrational properties, synchrotron X-ray diffraction (XRD) and micro-Raman spectroscopic experiments at high-pressures were carried out. As a complementary study, DFT simulations of the structural properties as a function of pressure were performed to support and explain the experimental findings. Furthermore, the electronic and magnetic properties as a function of pressure were investigated using DFT. Our study reveals a structural phase transition from a rhombohedral $R\bar{3}m$ to a monoclinic $C2/m$ phase at high pressure, accompanied by a significant increase in bulk modulus. Certain anomalies were observed in Raman mode frequencies at lower pressures of about 1 GPa, indicating changes in the electronic structure with a modification from direct to indirect bandgap in the sample. A minimum in the Raman mode full-width-half-maximum (FWHM) at about 11 GPa, coincides with an increase in ordering in the sample, indicated by a drop in the distortion index of Ni-O$_6$ octahedra as well as a discontinuity in the $c/a$ ratio.

AI.tldr: 本研究通过实验和计算相结合的方法，揭示了双钙钛矿Ba₂NiTeO₆在高压下从菱方相(R\bar{3}m)到单斜相(C2/m)的结构相变，并观察到电子结构变化（直接带隙→间接带隙）及有序度增强等关键现象。
AI.motivation: 探究双钙钛矿Ba₂NiTeO₆在高压下的结构、振动、电子及磁性质演化规律，理解压力诱导的相变机制及其物理性质变化。
AI.method: 采用同步辐射X射线衍射和显微拉曼光谱进行高压实验；利用DFT模拟进行结构、电子和磁性质的理论计算作为互补。
AI.result: 发现了菱方R\bar{3}m到单斜C2/m的结构相变，伴随体模量显著增加；约1 GPa时观察到拉曼模式频率异常，指示电子结构从直接带隙向间接带隙转变；约11 GPa时拉曼半高宽最小，对应Ni-O₆八面体畸变指数下降和c/a比不连续变化，表明样品有序度增强。
AI.conclusion: Ba₂NiTeO₆在高压下经历结构相变和电子结构调制，压力可用于调控其物理性质，为功能材料设计提供基础。

title: Time-boundary scattering and topological resonant transmissions
summary: Time boundaries (TBs), temporal analogues of spatial interfaces, offer a powerful handle to engineer quantum systems. However, unlike the well-developed stationary scattering theory at spatial interfaces, a unified framework for quantum scattering at TBs has been missing. Here we develop a Bloch-wave scattering theory for TBs by introducing a temporal scattering matrix $S$ between incoming and outgoing Bloch channels. We uncover topological resonant transmissions (RTs) -- poles of $S$ that yield perfect interband transmission and dynamical freezing of the quantum state. We establish a bulk-time-boundary correspondence for all integer Altland-Zirnbauer classes: the number of RTs equals the jump of the bulk topological invariant across the TB. In one dimension this gives a time-domain Levinson's theorem. A topological analysis further reveals a striking dimensional dependence. In even dimensions RTs are robust to temporal modulations and disorder, whereas in odd dimensions they can be destroyed by dynamical symmetry breaking. Our work places temporal and spatial scattering on the same footing and opens new avenues for engineering and probing quantum dynamics.

AI.tldr: 本文建立了时间边界（TBs）的Bloch波散射理论，引入了时间散射矩阵S，发现了拓扑共振传输（RTs）现象，建立了体-时间边界对应关系，并揭示了RTs在奇偶维度下的不同鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 空间界面的稳态散射理论已很成熟，但时间边界（TBs）的量子散射缺乏统一框架，亟需发展时间域散射理论。
AI.method: 通过引入时间散射矩阵S连接入射和出射Bloch通道，发展Bloch波散射理论；对Altland-Zirnbauer拓扑类建立体-时间边界对应；进行拓扑维度分析。
AI.result: 发现了拓扑共振传输（RTs）——S矩阵的极点导致完美的带间传输和量子态动态冻结；建立了RTs数量等于跨越TB时体拓扑不变量跳跃值的对应关系；揭示了偶数维RTs鲁棒、奇数维RTs可被对称性破缺破坏的维度依赖。
AI.conclusion: 将时间散射与空间散射置于同等地位，为工程和探测量子动力学开辟了新途径，并导出了一维时间域的Levinson定理。

title: Influence of ligand field and correlation on the electronic structure of NiO and CoO from DFT+DMFT calculations
summary: The intriguing physics and rich application potential of strongly correlated first-row transition metal oxide compounds result from the complex interplay of several factors that influence the electronic structure. To shed light on the effect of composition, structure, and correlation strength, we apply a well-established charge self-consistent combination of density functional theory and dynamical mean field theory, which has proven to give electron binding energies in good agreement to experimentally derived excitation spectra. For paramagnetic NiO and CoO, we analyze the effect of rock-salt and zincblende structures and their different ligand fields on the spectral functions. By varying the value of the interaction parameter U, different correlation strengths among the transition-metal 3d electrons are considered, as well as the effect of additionally accounting for correlations in the oxygen 2p orbitals by a self-interaction-correction pseudopotential scheme.

AI.tldr: 本文通过DFT+DMFT方法系统研究了NiO和CoO在岩盐矿和闪锌矿结构下的电子结构，分析了组成、结构和关联强度对光谱函数的影响，包括U参数变化和氧2p轨道关联效应。
AI.motivation: 理解强关联第一行过渡金属氧化物中组成、结构和关联强度等多种因素对电子结构的复杂相互作用及其物理与应用潜力。
AI.method: 采用电荷自洽的DFT+DMFT方法，结合自相互作用修正赝势方案，对顺磁NiO和CoO在岩盐矿和闪锌矿两种结构下进行计算分析，并改变Hubbard U参数以探究不同关联强度。
AI.result: 该方法给出的电子结合能与实验激发谱吻合良好；不同配位场（岩盐矿vs闪锌矿）显著影响光谱函数；U参数和氧2p轨道关联对电子结构均有重要影响。
AI.conclusion: DFT+DMFT方法能有效描述过渡金属氧化物的强关联电子结构，配位场效应和关联强度是调控其物理性质的关键因素。

title: Enhanced Valley Polarization via Nonlinear Cascaded Quantum-Geometric Selection Rules
summary: The quantum geometric properties of Bloch electrons fundamentally govern light-matter interactions and optical selection rules in solids. In semiconducting transition-metal dichalcogenides, circularly polarized excitation near the band edge enables valley-selective interband transitions, providing the basis for valleytronics. While nonlinear optical protocols are being developed to manipulate and probe valley selection rules, they largely rely on band-edge transitions that proceed via virtual intermediate states. Here, we demonstrate a doubly resonant cascaded nonlinear pathway from the valence band to high-lying states, mediated by a real intermediate state whose participation substantially reshapes the valley optical selection rules. Using time- and angle-resolved extreme-ultraviolet photoemission spectroscopy in combination with a time-dependent Lindblad master-equation formalism, we show that this cascaded nonlinear photoexcitation produces a substantially enhanced high-lying valley polarization compared to the conventional linear optical response near the band edge. The extension of the quantum-geometry-based selection rules to the nonlinear regime and high-lying bands offers new perspectives for ultrafast valleytronics and should play a determinant role in strong-field-driven phenomena in quantum materials.

AI.tldr: 本文证明了在过渡金属硫族化合物中，通过真实中间态参与的双共振级联非线性路径，可以显著增强高能谷极化，拓展了基于量子几何的选择规则到非线性领域。
AI.motivation: 现有非线性光协议主要依赖通过虚拟中间态的带边跃迁来操控谷选择规则，尚未探索真实中间态参与下的级联非线性路径对谷极化的影响。
AI.method: 采用时间分辨和角分辨极紫外光电子能谱，结合时间依赖的Lindblad主方程形式体系，实验和理论相结合研究级联非线性光激发过程。
AI.result: 发现级联非线性光激发相比传统线性光响应，能够产生显著增强的高能谷极化。
AI.conclusion: 将基于量子几何的选择规则拓展到非线性领域和高能带，为超快谷电子学提供了新视角，并在强场驱动现象中起决定性作用。

title: Cubic edge dispersion in a semi-Dirac Chern insulator
summary: Topological edge states in Chern insulators are typically characterized by a linear dispersion relation inherited from the Dirac structure of the bulk Hamiltonian. Here we show that this paradigm can be fundamentally altered in systems with anisotropic semi-Dirac band structures. We introduce a minimal two-band lattice model realizing a semi-Dirac Chern insulator and determine its topological phase diagram analytically. Using a mass-domain-wall approach in a semi-infinite geometry, we derive an explicit expression for the chiral edge states and find that their low-energy dispersion scales cubically with momentum, $E(k)\propto k^3$. Numerical diagonalization of the corresponding tight-binding ribbon confirms the analytical prediction. Our results demonstrate that unconventional bulk band structures can produce qualitatively different boundary excitations, providing a route to engineering nonstandard chiral edge dynamics in topological materials and synthetic quantum systems.

AI.tldr: 本文发现半狄拉克陈绝缘体中手性边缘态的低能色散呈现三次方关系 $E(k)\propto k^3$，打破了传统陈绝缘体边缘态线性色散的范式。
AI.motivation: 挑战传统认知——拓扑边缘态是否必须具有线性色散？探索各向异性半狄拉克能带结构能否产生非常规的边缘态行为。
AI.method: 构造最小两带晶格模型实现半狄拉克陈绝缘体，解析推导拓扑相图；采用质量畴壁方法在半无限几何中解析推导手性边缘态表达式；通过紧束缚条带数值对角化验证解析预言。
AI.result: 发现边缘态低能色散为 $E(k)\propto k^3$（立方色散），而非传统的线性色散；解析结果与数值模拟吻合。
AI.conclusion: 非常规体带结构可产生性质不同的边界激发，为工程化拓扑材料与合成量子系统中的非标准手性边缘动力学提供了新途径。

title: Spontaneous Topological Locking and Symmetry Restoration of Meron Lattices in Synthetic Antiferromagnets
summary: Synthetic antiferromagnets offer a robust platform for stabilizing fractional topological textures, effectively circumventing the limitations of ferromagnetic systems. In this study, we utilize large-scale Monte Carlo simulations to investigate the spontaneous topological locking and structural symmetry restoration of meron-antimeron crystals within SAF bilayers subjected to easy-plane magnetic anisotropy. In the uncoupled monolayer limit, increasing anisotropy induces an extreme core-shrinking effect that physically expands the inter-core distance and triggers a $C_4 \rightarrow C_2$ symmetry breaking. However, the introduction of an ultra-weak interlayer antiferromagnetic exchange acts as an active structural scaffold. For rigid crystals, this coupling strictly enforces vertical synchronization, forming robust antiferromagnetic bimeron dipoles and fully restoring the macroscopic $C_4$ rotational symmetry. Furthermore, in highly expanded, pre-collapse crystals, we observe an anomalous interlayer-induced lattice compression that actively maximizes the exchange energy. At extreme anisotropy limits where macroscopic crystalline order irrecoverably collapses, the bilayer coupling continues to enforce a strict local topological locking of surviving isolated defects. These findings reveal a fundamental decoupling between local vertical synchronization and global structural order, providing a comprehensive theoretical roadmap for stabilizing and manipulating fractional topological textures in beyond-skyrmion spintronic architectures.

AI.tldr: 通过大规模蒙特卡洛模拟，研究了合成反铁磁双层膜中meron-antimeron晶体的拓扑锁定与对称性恢复机制，揭示了超弱层间反铁磁交换耦合在稳定分数拓扑纹理中的关键作用。
AI.motivation: 铁磁系统在稳定分数拓扑纹理方面存在固有局限性，而合成反铁磁体提供了一种更鲁棒的替代平台，但目前对其在易面磁各向异性条件下的拓扑锁定和结构对称性恢复机制尚不清楚。
AI.method: 采用大规模蒙特卡洛模拟，研究具有易面磁各向异性的合成反铁磁双层膜中meron-antimeron晶体的自发拓扑锁定与结构对称性恢复过程。
AI.result: (1) 单层极限下，增强各向异性导致核心收缩、核间距离增大，引发C4→C2对称性破缺；(2) 超弱层间反铁磁耦合作为结构支架，实现垂直同步锁定，恢复C4对称性；(3) 在预塌缩晶体中观察到反常的层间诱导晶格压缩；(4) 宏观晶序崩溃后，双层耦合仍强制局部拓扑锁定。
AI.conclusion: 揭示了局部垂直同步与全局结构序之间的基本解耦机制，为在超越斯格明子的自旋电子学架构中稳定和操控分数拓扑纹理提供了全面的理论路线图。

title: Renormalization group analysis for bosonization coefficients in half-odd-integer Kitaev spin chains
summary: Based on a renormalization group (RG) analysis, we study the bosonization formulas in spin-S Kitaev-Gamma and Kitaev-Heisenberg-Gamma chains in the (K < 0, Gamma > 0, J > 0) parameter region, where S is a half-odd integer. We find that the effects associated with the breaking of emergent continuous symmetries in bosonization formulas scale as 1/S in the large-S limit, which is in qualitative agreement with DMRG numerical results for Kitaev-Gamma chains. In Kitaev-Heisenberg-Gamma chains, symmetry analysis reveals ten independent bosonization coefficients, five of which are predicted by the RG analysis to have no dependence on the Heisenberg coupling up to linear order. Our work may offer valuable input for determining magnetic ordering tendencies in two-dimensional Kitaev spin models within a quasi-one-dimensional approach.

AI.tldr: 本文通过重正化群分析研究了自旋-S Kitaev-Gamma和Kitaev-Heisenberg-Gamma链中的玻色化公式，发现连续对称性破缺效应在S→∞时按1/S标度，并预测了Heisenberg耦合对若干系数的线性无关性。该工作为准一维方法研究二维Kitaev自旋模型的磁序趋向提供了指导。
AI.motivation: 理解自旋-S Kitaev-Gamma和Kitaev-Heisenberg-Gamma链在(K<0, Gamma>0, J>0)参数区的低能物理行为，特别是玻色化公式中连续对称性破缺带来的修正效应，以及这些效应对准一维框架下研究二维Kitaev模型磁序的启示。
AI.method: 采用重正化群（RG）分析对自旋-S（S为半奇整数）Kitaev-Gamma和Kitaev-Heisenberg-Gamma链进行玻色化研究。
AI.result: 1) 玻色化公式中涌现连续对称性破缺的效应在S→∞时按1/S标度，与Kitaev-Gamma链的DMRG数值结果定性一致。2) Kitaev-Heisenberg-Gamma链中存在十个独立的玻色化系数，其中五个在RG分析下对Heisenberg耦合线性阶不敏感。
AI.conclusion: 该工作为准一维方法研究二维Kitaev自旋模型的磁序趋向提供了有价值的输入。

title: Deterministic positioning of circular Bragg gratings using atomic force lithography for high-performance quantum dot light sources
summary: Semiconductor quantum dots (QDs) grown by molecular beam epitaxy are excellent quantum emitters, but their random spatial distribution hinders deterministic coupling to optical microcavities. We demonstrate a room-temperature atomic force microscopy (AFM)-assisted nano-oxidation lithography technique enabling QD positioning with a radial displacement of $51(28)$ nm. Free-standing asymmetric circular Bragg gratings incorporating AFM-positioned GaAs QDs exhibit a $245$-fold photoluminescence enhancement and fine-structure splitting (FSS) comparable to bulk QDs. Polarization-resolved spectroscopy and finite-difference time-domain simulations show robust emission for displacements up to $50$ nm (Stokes parameter $\lvert S \rvert < 0.05$ ). The devices display stable FSS and polarization imbalance below $5 \, \%$ , confirming precise, reproducible alignment and potential for high fidelity devices. This scalable approach enables deterministic integration of high-performance QDs with photonic cavities, advancing practical quantum light sources for quantum information technologies.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种室温原子力显微镜辅助纳米氧化光刻技术，实现了半导体量子点的精确定位（径向位移51±28 nm），并集成到非对称环形布拉格光栅中，获得了245倍的光致发光增强和稳定的精细结构分裂，为量子光源的确定性集成提供了可扩展方案。
AI.motivation: 半导体量子点是优秀的量子发射体，但分子束外延生长导致其空间分布随机，难以与光学微腔实现确定性耦合，限制了其在量子信息技术中的应用。
AI.method: 采用室温原子力显微镜辅助纳米氧化光刻技术精确定位量子点；将定位后的GaAs量子点集成到自由悬挂的非对称环形布拉格光栅中；通过偏振分辨光谱和时域有限差分模拟验证器件性能。
AI.result: 量子点定位径向位移为51±28 nm；器件实现245倍光致发光增强；精细结构分裂与未集成量子点相当；位移50 nm内发射稳健（Stokes参数|S|<0.05）；偏振不平衡度低于5%。
AI.conclusion: 该可扩展方法实现了高性能量子点与光子腔的确定性集成，为量子信息技术中实用化量子光源的制备提供了可行路径。

title: Gossamer Superconductivity in Moiré WSe$_2$ Bilayer
summary: Moiré transition metal dichalcogenides have served as a versatile platform for simulating Hubbard physics. Recent experiments have identified robust superconductivity in moiré bilayer WSe$_2$ for certain twist angles. Here, we propose the gossamer nature of the superconductivity recently discovered at half-filling and zero displacement field in twisted WSe$_2$. By mapping the moiré continuum system to an effective extended single-orbital Hubbard model on the triangular lattice, we employ renormalized mean-field theory to investigate the strong-coupling phase diagram. We find that a moderate Coulomb repulsion partially suppresses charge fluctuations while preserving a finite density of mobile doublons and holes. In this regime, the interplay between extended kinetic hoppings and antiferromagnetic superexchange stabilizes a chiral $d+id$ superconducting phase. Our results naturally account for the twist-angle-dependent evolution from a Mott insulator to a superconductor and eventually to a correlated metal. Furthermore, the model demonstrates that this half-filled pairing state vanishes rapidly upon density doping, consistent with experimental observations.

AI.tldr: 本文提出扭曲双层WSe₂中在half-filling和零位移场下发现的超导电性具有gossamer性质。通过将莫尔连续系统映射到三角晶格上的扩展单轨道Hubbard模型，并采用重整化平均场理论，发现中等强度的库仑排斥部分抑制电荷涨落，同时保留移动的双子和空穴，在此区间内扩展动能和反铁磁超交换的相互作用稳定了手性d+id超导相。该结果自然解释了从莫特绝缘体到超导体再到关联金属的依赖于扭转角的演化，且模型表明该配对态在掺杂下迅速消失，与实验一致。
AI.motivation: 解释实验上在扭曲WSe₂中发现的超导电性的配对机制，特别是half-filling和零位移场下的非常规超导现象。
AI.method: 将莫尔连续系统映射到三角晶格上的扩展单轨道Hubbard模型，利用重整化平均场理论（RMFT）研究强耦合相图。
AI.result: 中等库仑排斥下，扩展动能与反铁磁超交换协同稳定手性d+id超导相；超导相随扭转角从莫特绝缘体演变为超导体再到关联金属；half-filling下的配对态在掺杂下快速消失。
AI.conclusion: 提出的gossamer超导机制能够自洽地解释扭曲WSe₂中关键实验现象，为理解莫尔体系中的非常规超导提供了理论框架。

title: First-principles prediction of chiral-phonon-induced orbital accumulation
summary: Chiral phonons offer a route to transfer angular momentum without relying on magnetic order, but their electronic response in metals remains poorly understood from perspectives beyond spin-based scenarios. Using first-principles calculations, we show that coherent chiral lattice motion generates orbital accumulation and, through spin-orbit coupling, a smaller accompanying spin accumulation. Our approach evaluates orbital and spin expectation values directly from strain perturbed ab initio Hamiltonians in the long-wavelength limit, where the phonon perturbation is represented by symmetry adapted circular lattice distortions. We show that the response is controlled mainly by orbital character, near-degeneracies, and electron-phonon coupling, rather than by spin-orbit coupling alone. These results identify light transition metals as promising platforms for chiral-phonon-driven orbitronics.

AI.tldr: 本文通过第一性原理计算证明，手性声子可诱导金属中的轨道积累（以及较小的自旋积累），其响应主要受轨道特性、近简并性和电子-声子耦合控制，而非自旋-轨道耦合单独决定，为光过渡金属在手性声子驱动轨道电子学中的应用提供了理论依据。
AI.motivation: 手性声子为无需磁有序即可传递角动量提供了途径，但金属中手性声子的电子响应（超越自旋视角）仍知之甚少。
AI.method: 采用第一性原理计算，从应变微扰的ab initio哈密顿量中直接评估长波极限下的轨道和自旋期望值，手性声子扰动由对称性适配的圆晶格畸变表示。
AI.result: 相干手性晶格运动可产生轨道积累，并通过自旋-轨道耦合产生较小的伴随自旋积累；响应主要由轨道特性、近简并性和电子-声子耦合控制。
AI.conclusion: 轻过渡金属是手性声子驱动轨道电子学（orbitronics）的有前景平台。

title: Numerical evidence of a critical point in the (2+1)D SO(5) nonlinear sigma model with Wess-Zumino-Witten term
summary: We develop an optimized continuous-field quantum Monte Carlo (QMC) algorithm to investigate the SO(5) nonlinear sigma model with a Wess-Zumino-Witten term, which describes half-filled Dirac fermions in 2+1 space-time dimensions akin to graphene and Yukawa coupled to a quintuplet of compatible mass terms. To regularize the theory, we project onto the lowest Landau level for both spherical and torus geometries. Our algorithm reduces the computational complexity to $O(βN_{\mathbf{q}} N_φ^2)$, yielding a speedup of a factor of $N_φ$ (the number of magnetic fluxes, i.e., system size) relative to prior works [1-3]. This advance enables us to simulate system sizes up to $N_φ=140$ on torus and $N_φ=49$ on sphere, far exceeding the maximum sizes accessed, and to map out the universal phase diagram of the model on both geometries. Most notably, we identify and characterize a critical point that separates an SO(5)-broken ordered phase at small coupling from an SO(5)-symmetric disordered phase at large coupling. The critical point becomes multicritical upon the inclusion of terms that break the SO(5) symmetry down to $\mathrm{U}(1) \times \mathrm{SU}(2)$, relevant for the deconfined phase transition between Néel antiferromagnetic and valence-bond-solid orders in quantum magnets. While the precise nature of the disordered phase in the thermodynamic limit remains to be determined, we argue that it is neither conformal nor trivially gapped, akin to a chiral quantum spin liquid with a small gap. Our finding of a multicritical point in the phase diagram of the SO(5) nonlinear sigma model with Wess-Zumino-Witten term resolves the long-standing open question of its global structure, and our QMC framework opens a new avenue for systematic studies of projected Hamiltonians, ranging from correlated flat bands to fractional quantum (anomalous) Hall systems.

AI.tldr: 本文开发了一种优化的连续场量子蒙特卡洛算法，将计算复杂度降低至O(βN_q N_φ²)，使得SO(5)非线性sigma模型（含Wess-Zumino-Witten项）的模拟规模大幅提升至N_φ=140（环面）和N_φ=49（球面），首次绘制出该模型的全局相图，发现了SO(5)破缺有序相与SO(5)对称无序相之间的临界点，并论证该无序相既非共形也非平凡带隙，类似于手性量子自旋液体。
AI.motivation: 解决SO(5)非线性sigma模型（含Wess-Zumino-Witten项）全局相图这一长期悬而未决的问题，并突破此前数值模拟的系统尺寸限制。
AI.method: 开发优化的连续场量子蒙特卡洛算法，投影到最低朗道能级，分别在球面和环面几何上进行模拟，计算复杂度为O(βN_q N_φ²)。
AI.result: 实现了N_φ=140（环面）和N_φ=49（球面）的大规模模拟；识别出SO(5)破缺有序相与对称无序相之间的临界点；该临界点在SO(5)对称性破缺至U(1)×SU(2)时变为多临界点。
AI.conclusion: 解决了SO(5)非线性sigma模型全局相图这一长期悬而未决的问题；提出的QMC框架为投影哈密顿量的系统研究开辟了新途径，可应用于关联平带和分数量子（反常）霍尔系统。

title: Beyond lead halide perovskites: visible light photovoltaics with phase engineered bismuth-based oxide double-perovskites, Bi2MCrO6 (M = Fe, Mn)
summary: Lead poisoning and notorious ambient instability in lead-based halide perovskites pave the way for the exploration of alternative materials for affordable and efficient solar cell fabrication. An important prerequisite to this end is the optoelectronic evaluation of the proposed material. Here we report, optoelectronic characterization of Bi2FeCrO6 (BFCO) and Bi2MnCrO6 (BMCO) thin films vis-à-vis performance of photovoltaic cells. Solution-deposited thin films (350-450 nm) of the above compositions demonstrate a double-perovskite structure with monoclinic P21/c symmetry, albeit with mixed cation valences and deep-level defects. A thorough optoelectronic evaluation exhibits large optical absorption in the visible range (α ~ 104 -105 cm-1), and high carrier density, ~1017-20 cm-3. Ultraviolet photoelectron spectroscopy measurement allowed determination of the positions of the band-edges (valence band maximum and conduction band minimum), required for the selection of carrier transport layers. In its first, BMCO-based FTO/SnO2/BMCO/Spiro-OMeTAD/Ag solar cell produced a maximum 3.56% conversion efficiency. Using numerical simulation, we predict that with suitable defect control, the above conversion efficiency can increase significantly.

AI.tldr: 本文报道了双钙钛矿材料Bi2FeCrO6和Bi2MnCrO6薄膜的光电特性及其在光伏电池中的应用，BMCO基太阳能电池首次实现了3.56%的转换效率，并通过数值模拟预测通过缺陷控制可大幅提升效率。
AI.motivation: 铅基卤化物钙钛矿存在铅毒性和不稳定性问题，迫切需要探索替代材料以实现低成本、高效的太阳能电池制造。
AI.method: 采用溶液沉积法制备BFCO和BMCO双钙钛矿薄膜（350-450 nm），通过紫外光电子能谱（UPS）测定能带位置，构建FTO/SnO2/BMCO/Spiro-OMeTAD/Ag电池结构，并结合数值模拟进行性能预测。
AI.result: 薄膜具有单斜P21/c双钙钛矿结构，可见光范围吸收系数达10^4-10^5 cm^-1，载流子密度约10^17-20 cm^-3。BMCO基电池首次实现3.56%的转换效率。
AI.conclusion: BFCO和BMCO是铅基钙钛矿的有前景替代材料，通过进一步缺陷控制，其光电转换效率有望显著提升。

title: Theory of transmittance of narrow quantum wires intersection in 2D systems
summary: The transmittance of intersection between narrow quantum strips is studied. It is assumed that strip widths are less than the electron wavelength, so that they are tunnel conductors. In this assumption the Schrödinger equation is reduced to the Laplace one, which can be solved by the conformal mappings. The transmittances of T-like and X-like wire crossings are found.

AI.tldr: 本文通过共形映射方法研究窄量子条交叉点的透射率，在条宽小于电子波长的隧道导电假设下，将薛定谔方程简化为拉普拉斯方程，并求解了T型和X型线交叉的透射率。
AI.motivation: 研究窄量子条（宽度小于电子波长）交叉点的电子透射行为，这类结构在量子器件中具有重要应用价值。
AI.method: 假设条宽小于电子波长（隧道导电条件），将薛定谔方程简化为拉普拉斯方程，并利用共形映射方法求解。
AI.result: 得到了T型和X型两种线交叉结构的透射率表达式或数值结果。
AI.conclusion: 共形映射方法可有效求解窄量子条交叉点的透射问题，并为量子线网络设计提供理论依据。

title: A Correction Method for Crack Area Overestimation in Phase-Field Fracture
summary:
Phase-field fracture models are known to overestimate the crack area, a discrepancy that compromises the accuracy of fracture predictions. This issue stems from the diffuse crack representation and numerical artifacts, such as strain localization, where the phase-field variable artificially saturates across finite elements.
  Existing correction strategies, including mesh-dependent factors and skeletonization algorithms, have significant limitations. Mesh-based corrections are often unreliable for unstructured meshes, while skeletonization can be complex and inaccurate for intricate crack topologies, especially in three dimensions.
  This paper introduces a novel and robust framework to correct this overestimation. Our approach is founded on the principle of energy equipartition, where the energy contributions from the phase-field and its gradient are equal as the length-scale parameter approaches zero. Since numerical artifacts primarily affect the phase-field term while leaving the gradient term largely unperturbed, we propose that the crack area can be accurately approximated as twice the gradient-dependent energy. This method is inherently mesh-independent and readily applicable to the entire domain, including 3D simulations.
  The proposed methodology is validated against benchmarks with analytical solutions and compared with established methods like skeletonization to demonstrate its accuracy. It is then applied to complex geometries with curvilinear crack paths and evaluated in a three-dimensional simulation.

AI.tldr: 该论文针对相场断裂模型高估裂纹面积的问题，基于能量均分原理提出了一种与网格无关、适用于三维的裂纹面积校正框架，通过梯度相关能量近似裂纹面积，并在多个基准测试中验证了其准确性。
AI.motivation: 相场断裂模型因弥散裂纹表示和数值伪影（如应变局部化）导致裂纹面积被高估，现有校正方法（网格依赖因子、骨架化算法）在非结构化网格或复杂裂纹拓扑下存在可靠性差、精度低等局限性，亟需一种鲁棒且通用的校正框架。
AI.method: 基于能量均分原理（当长度尺度参数趋近零时，相场项与梯度项能量相等），利用数值伪影主要影响相场项而梯度项几乎不受扰动的特点，提出裂纹面积可近似为两倍的梯度依赖能量，该方法与网格无关且适用于整个域（包括三维模拟）。
AI.result: 在具有解析解的基准测试中验证了准确性，与骨架化等现有方法对比表现更优，并成功应用于曲线裂纹路径的复杂几何及三维模拟场景。
AI.conclusion: 该框架有效解决了相场断裂模型中的裂纹面积高估问题，具有网格无关性和三维适用性，为复杂断裂问题的精确模拟提供了可靠工具。

title: Coherent transport in non-Abelian quantum graphs
summary: We study quantum charge transport in two-dimensional networks in the presence of a magnetic field and spin-orbit interaction. The interplay of the corresponding Abelian and non-Abelian gauge fields leads to an intricate behavior of the conductance, which has different periodicities in the diffusive and ballistic regimes. We classify all configurations of magnetic and spin-orbit fields where a logarithmically divergent weak-(anti)localization correction appears in the diffusive regime. The conductivity of topologically distinct configurations is the same in the diffusive regime but different in the ballistic regime. The proposed setup provides a feasible realization of quantum graphs with non-Abelian gauge fields.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了二维网络中在磁场和自旋-轨道相互作用下的量子电荷输运，揭示了阿贝尔与非阿贝尔规范场相互作用导致的复杂电导行为，并分类了扩散区出现对数发散弱局域化修正的配置。
AI.motivation: 探索磁场（阿贝尔规范场）与自旋-轨道相互作用（非阿贝尔规范场）在二维网络中的协同效应，理解两者对量子电荷输运的不同影响机制。
AI.method: 通过理论分析，区分扩散区和弹道区两种输运机制，对磁性和自旋-轨道场的配置进行分类研究，比较不同拓扑配置下的电导行为。
AI.result: 不同拓扑配置在扩散区具有相同的电导率，但在弹道区表现出不同行为；扩散区存在对数发散的弱（反）局域化修正。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为非阿贝尔规范场量子图的实验实现提供了可行方案，揭示了阿贝尔与非阿贝尔规范场在量子输运中的丰富相互作用。

title: Plasmons in Holographic Ersatz Fermi Liquids
summary: We solve an infrared effective holographic model of a non-Fermi liquid at finite temperature that satisfies Luttinger's theorem and incorporates long-range Coulomb interactions.
