Motivated by the absence of a Luttinger-counting Fermi surface in standard Reissner-Nordstrom holographic metals, we consider a Maxwell-Chern-Simons theory in a static anti-de Sitter-Schwarzschild background, coupled to an LU(1) gauge field rather than a conventional U(1) gauge field. By an appropriate choice of boundary conditions, we obtain a damped collective plasmon mode whose plasma frequency scales as predicted by Luttinger's theorem. We further analyze the density-density correlator in the absence of long-range Coulomb interactions and identify a contribution consistent with a Lindhard-like continuum.

AI.tldr: 本文在有限温度下求解了一个满足Luttinger定理并包含长程库仑相互作用的红外有效全息非费米液体模型。通过使用麦克斯韦-陈-西蒙斯理论和LU(1)规范场，得到了一个阻尼等离激元模式，其等离子体频率符合Luttinger定理的预测，并在无库仑相互作用时发现了类似Lindhard连续谱的贡献。
AI.motivation: 标准的Reissner-Nordstrom全息金属中缺少Luttinger计数的费米面，因此作者希望构建一个满足Luttinger定理、包含长程库仑相互作用的非费米液体全息模型。
AI.method: 采用麦克斯韦-陈-西蒙斯理论，在静态反德西特-史瓦西背景中耦合LU(1)规范场（而非传统U(1)规范场），通过适当选择边界条件求解红外有效全息模型。
AI.result: 得到了一个阻尼集体等离激元模式，其等离子体频率按Luttinger定理预测的标度行为变化；同时，在没有长程库仑相互作用时，密度-密度关联函数中识别出类似Lindhard连续谱的贡献。
AI.conclusion: 该全息模型成功描述了满足Luttinger定理的非费米液体行为，并再现了等离激元和Lindhard连续谱等关键物理特征。

title: Defect-Engineered Beryllium Dinitride (BeN2) Monolayer with Light-Metal Decoration for Reversible High-Capacity Hydrogen Storage
comment: Correspondence: ntit@uaeu.ac.ae & tanveer.hussain@une.edu.au. The first two listed authors have equal contributions
summary: Hydrogen (H2) possesses the highest gravimetric energy density of any chemical fuel and is the most abundant element in the universe. However, its extremely low volumetric energy density at standard conditions imposes a fundamental materials challenge for safe, efficient, and reversible storage. Here, we report a defect-engineered 2D beryllium dinitride (BeN2) monolayer that enables stable light-metal functionalization for high-capacity H2 storage. A 2 x 2 supercell containing two intrinsic beryllium vacancies accommodates four Li, Na, and K atoms without clustering, exhibiting strong average metal-vacancy binding energies of -3.80, -2.94, and -3.18 eV, respectively. Ab initio molecular dynamics simulations at 400 K confirm the thermal stability of the metal-decorated frameworks and the suppression of metal aggregation. The vacancy-stabilized alkali-metal centers generate localized charge polarization that facilitates the adsorption of up to 20 H2 molecules per supercell, with average adsorption energies of -0.182 eV (Li), -0.191 eV (Na), and -0.171 eV (K), making the adsorption reversible under near-ambient conditions. The corresponding gravimetric H2 storage capacities reach 11.64, 9.82, and 8.49 wt percent, respectively, significantly exceeding the US Department of Energy (DOE) ultimate target of 6.50 wt percent. Moreover, thermodynamic analysis further confirms favorable adsorption-desorption behavior within practical operating windows. These results establish vacancy-defected light-metal decorated BeN2 as a viable design strategy for high-density, reversible H2 storage, providing a scalable framework for engineering polar lightweight materials for energy storage applications.

AI.tldr: 本文报道了一种缺陷工程化的二维BeN2单层材料，通过引入铍空位并修饰Li、Na、K等碱金属原子，实现了高容量、可逆的氢存储，其重量密度远超美国能源部终极目标（6.50 wt%），分别达到11.64、9.82和8.49 wt%。
AI.motivation: 氢气的体积能量密度极低，传统材料难以同时满足安全、高效、可逆的存储需求，亟需开发新型高容量储氢材料。
AI.method: 采用缺陷工程策略，在2×2超胞的BeN2单层中引入两个铍空位，用于稳定锚定Li、Na、K原子，并通过第一性原理计算和从头算分子动力学模拟评估其储氢性能。
AI.result: 碱金属原子与空位结合能强（-2.94~-3.80 eV），热稳定性好（400 K下无聚集）；每个超胞可吸附20个H₂分子，平均吸附能约-0.17~-0.19 eV，适于近室温可逆储氢；Li、Na、K修饰体系分别达到11.64、9.82、8.49 wt%的储氢容量。
AI.conclusion: 缺陷工程化的碱金属修饰BeN2单层是一种可行的设计策略，可实现高密度、可逆的氢存储，为开发轻质极性储氢材料提供了可扩展的框架。

title: Remote entropy measurement in coupled quantum dots
summary: Recent experiments have demonstrated that measurements of the entropy change associated with the addition of electrons to semiconductor- and graphene-based quantum dots accurately quantify the spin and orbital degeneracy of the states into which they are added. However, measuring more exotic entropies requires probing the entropy change of an entire system in response to an added particle. Here, we demonstrate that Maxwell relation-based measurements probe not only the entropy change associated with the added electron but also that of the surrounding system as it responds to that electron. Using a pair of capacitively coupled GaAs quantum dots, we show that charge measurements on one dot reveal entropy changes associated with the entire two-dot system, both at weak dot--reservoir coupling where microstate counting applies and at stronger coupling where numerical renormalization group calculations are required.

AI.tldr: 该研究通过电容耦合的GaAs量子点对，证明了基于麦克斯韦关系的测量方法不仅能探测添加电子引起的熵变，还能探测整个系统响应该电子时的熵变，在弱耦合和强耦合条件下均有效。
AI.motivation: 现有实验能准确量化量子点中态的自旋和轨道简并度，但无法测量更复杂的熵变（如整个系统对添加粒子的响应）。作者希望突破这一局限，探索测量整个系统熵变的方法。
AI.method: 利用一对电容耦合的GaAs量子点，在一个量子点上进行电荷测量，基于麦克斯韦关系来推断整个两量子点系统（包括添加电子及其周围系统响应）的熵变。实验覆盖了弱耦合（可用微态计数）和强耦合（需数值重整化群计算）两种条件。
AI.result: 证明了电荷测量能揭示整个两量子点系统的熵变，且该方法在弱耦合和强耦合条件下均适用。
AI.conclusion: 基于麦克斯韦关系的测量方法可以探测比传统方法更“奇异”的熵变，为研究更复杂量子系统的热力学性质提供了新途径。

title: Parameterized Families of Toric Code Phase: $em$-duality family and higher-order anyon pumping
summary: Within the toric-code phase, we study parameterized families of topologically ordered states. We construct $1$- and $2$-parameter families of local Hamiltonians and confirm their non-triviality via topological pumping. For the $1$-parameter family, we show that the $em$-exchange defect is pumped into the bond Hilbert space of a tensor-network representation. For the $2$-parameter case, we construct a ``pump of a pump'' that transports an $S^1$-family of a system in one lower spatial dimension. Using similar methods, we also present a $1$-parameter family with a higher-order anyon pump that produces corner-localized anyon modes. These constructions provide explicit lattice realizations and concrete diagnostics of family-level topology. We use recently developed boundary algebra methods to study the non-triviality of these families.

AI.tldr: 本文在toric-code相中构造了1参数和2参数的局域哈密顿量族，通过拓扑泵浦证明其非平凡性，并用边界代数方法研究了这些族的家族级拓扑。同时展示了高阶任意子泵浦和“泵浦的泵浦”等新奇现象。
AI.motivation: 在拓扑序系统中，研究参数化族（family）的非平凡拓扑结构，以及如何通过构造局域哈密顿量族来实现家族级拓扑（family-level topology）的显式晶格实现。
AI.method: 1) 构造1参数族：将em-exchange defect泵入张量网络表示的键Hilbert空间；2) 构造2参数族：实现“泵浦的泵浦”，将一个低一维系统的S^1族进行传输；3) 构造具有高阶任意子泵浦的1参数族，产生角局域任意子模式；4) 使用边界代数方法分析族的非平凡性。
AI.result: 成功构造了具有家族级拓扑的1参数和2参数族，展示了em-exchange defect的泵浦、泵浦的泵浦以及高阶任意子泵浦等非平凡拓扑现象，并提供了具体的晶格实现和诊断方法。
AI.conclusion: 这项工作为家族级拓扑（family-level topology）提供了显式的晶格模型和可操作的诊断工具，扩展了对拓扑序中参数化族的理解，特别是通过边界代数方法为高阶拓扑泵浦提供了新的理论框架。

title: Quantum Metric Localization and Quantum Metric Protection
summary: The study of disorder effects in electronic systems is one of the central themes in physics. It is well established that in the Anderson localization regime, the localization length of electrons decreases monotonically as the disorder strength increases. Here, we demonstrate that the conventional Anderson localization paradigm fails completely in describing an isolated band with quantum metric, where the quantum metric of the band defines a length scale called the quantum metric length. For an isolated band with a finite bandwidth separated from other bands by a band gap $Δ$, weak disorder results in conventional Anderson localization behavior. However, as the disorder increases, the localization length ceases to decrease and becomes pinned at a value approximately twice the quantum metric length, forming a localization length plateau. We term the regime within this localization length plateau as the quantum metric localization regime. Remarkably, the localization length does not deviate from the plateau until the disorder strength far exceeds $Δ$. We refer to this strong protection against disorder, characterized by the quantum metric length, as quantum metric protection. In this work, we first numerically demonstrate quantum metric localization using a 1D Lieb lattice. We then provide a simple physical picture based on the properties of Wannier functions to explain the origin of the localization length plateau. A supersymmetric field theory approach explains why the localization length is approximately twice the quantum metric length and captures the crossover from Anderson localization to quantum metric localization. Our conclusions are broadly applicable to disordered electronic, photonic, and acoustic systems.

AI.tldr: 本文发现，在具有量子度量的孤立能带中，传统安德森局域化范式失效。随着无序增强，局域化长度不再单调减小，而是被钉扎在约两倍量子度量长度处，形成局域化长度平台，称为量子度量局域化。这一现象源于量子度量对无序的强保护，称为量子度量保护。
AI.motivation: 传统安德森局域化理论认为局域化长度随无序强度单调递减，但作者发现对于具有量子度量的孤立能带，这一范式不再成立，因此需要重新审视无序系统中的局域化行为。
AI.method: 通过1D Lieb晶格进行数值模拟，利用Wannier函数性质提供物理图像，并采用超对称场论方法解释局域化长度约等于两倍量子度量长度，以及从安德森局域化到量子度量局域化的交叉行为。
AI.result: 弱无序时表现传统安德森局域化；随无序增强，局域化长度停止下降，被钉扎在约两倍量子度量长度处，形成平台；该平台在无序强度远超能隙时仍不破坏。
AI.conclusion: 量子度量局域化是一种新的局域化机制，广泛适用于无序电子、光子及声子系统，挑战了传统安德森局域化的认知。

title: Graph Neural Networks in the Wilson Loop Representation of Abelian Lattice Gauge Theories
summary: Local gauge structures play a central role in a wide range of condensed matter systems and synthetic quantum platforms, where they emerge as effective descriptions of strongly correlated phases and engineered dynamics. We introduce a gauge-invariant graph neural network (GNN) architecture for Abelian lattice gauge models, in which symmetry is enforced explicitly through local gauge-invariant inputs, such as Wilson loops, and preserved throughout message passing, eliminating redundant gauge degrees of freedom while retaining expressive power. We benchmark the approach on both $\mathbb{Z}_2$ and $\mathrm{U}(1)$ lattice gauge models, achieving accurate predictions of global observables and spatially resolved quantities despite the nonlocal correlations induced by gauge-matter coupling. We further demonstrate that the learned model serves as an efficient surrogate for semiclassical dynamics in $\mathrm{U}(1)$ quantum link models, enabling stable and scalable time evolution without repeated fermionic diagonalization, while faithfully reproducing both local dynamics and statistical correlations. These results establish gauge-invariant message passing as a compact and physically grounded framework for learning and simulating Abelian lattice gauge systems.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种规范不变图神经网络（GNN）架构，通过使用规范不变输入（如Wilson环）并保持消息传递过程中的规范对称性，高效学习阿贝尔晶格规范模型，在Z₂和U(1)模型上准确预测全局与局域可观测量，并作为半经典动力学的高效代理实现稳定可扩展的时间演化。
AI.motivation: 晶格规范模型在凝聚态物理和量子模拟平台中至关重要，但由于规范冗余和非局域关联，传统数值方法（如蒙特卡洛、张量网络）存在符号问题或计算瓶颈。作者希望构建一种既能严格保持规范对称性、又能高效学习的神经网络架构。
AI.method: 设计了规范不变图神经网络（GNN），输入采用规范不变量（如Wilson loop），消息传递过程天然保持规范对称性，从而消除冗余自由度。在Z₂和U(1)晶格规范模型上进行基准测试，并应用于U(1)量子链接模型的半经典动力学模拟。
AI.result: 在Z₂和U(1)模型上准确预测了全局可观测量和空间分辨量；作为U(1)量子链接模型的代理，实现了稳定可扩展的长时间演化，无需重复进行费米子对角化，并能忠实再现局域动力学和统计关联。
AI.conclusion: 规范不变消息传递为学习和模拟阿贝尔晶格规范系统提供了一种紧凑且物理基础坚实的框架，兼顾了对称性保持与表达能力。

title: The high K anomaly in ScAlN explained
summary: We resolve the long-standing discrepancy between theoretical material constants and experimental observations of the dielectric response in scandium aluminum nitride (ScAlN). While first-principles calculations of the rigid lattice predict a permittivity of about 11.7, experiments consistently report values near 15. We demonstrate that this "high K" behavior is a manifestation of electromechanical inflation, where the enormous internal electric fields of polar heterostructures induce macroscopic lattice strain via the inverse piezoelectric effect. By applying stress-free mechanical boundary conditions to the coupled equations of state, we derive an analytical relation for the effective permittivity: epsilon_eff=epsilon_33^S + e_33^2/C_33. This model quantitatively accounts for experimental observations across the ScAlN alloy range and defines the fundamental limit of the rigid-lattice approximation in highly polar semiconductors.

AI.tldr: 该研究解决了ScAlN材料介电响应的理论与实验长期存在的矛盾，发现实验观察到的"高K"行为源于逆压电效应引起的机电膨胀，并推导出有效介电常数的解析关系式，定量解释了实验观测结果。
AI.motivation: 解决第一性原理计算预测的ScAlN介电常数（约11.7）与实验观测值（约15）之间长期存在的差异，揭示这一矛盾背后的物理机制。
AI.method: 对耦合状态方程施加无应力力学边界条件，推导出有效介电常数的解析关系式 ε_eff = ε_33^S + e_33²/C_33，将机电耦合效应纳入介电响应分析。
AI.result: 推导的解析模型定量解释了ScAlN合金全组分范围内的实验观测结果，阐明了刚性晶格近似在高极性半导体中的基本局限性。
AI.conclusion: 实验观察到的"高K"行为是极性异质结构中巨大内电场通过逆压电效应引起宏观晶格应变的结果，即机电膨胀效应。

title: Initial Development of MBE-Grown InAs Diodes for Thermoradiative Energy Harvesting
summary: We describe the development of 1x1 mm2 InAs thermoradiative diodes grown by molecular beam epitaxy with emphasis on their reverse saturation current and break-down voltage. P-i-n diode structures grown at 450 C, with As2 flux around 3 times stoichiometry and an In effusion cell tip temperature 150 C higher than the base temperature, exhibit the best results with breakdown voltages above 0.3 V and reverse saturation current densities 200 times the radiative limit.

AI.tldr: 本文报道了分子束外延生长的1x1 mm² InAs热辐射二极管，重点研究了其反向饱和电流和击穿电压特性。在450°C、As₂流量约为化学计量比3倍、In源炉尖端温度比基座温度高150°C的条件下生长的p-i-n二极管结构表现最佳，击穿电压超过0.3 V，反向饱和电流密度为辐射极限的200倍。
AI.motivation: 开发和优化InAs热辐射二极管，研究其反向饱和电流和击穿电压特性，以推动热辐射能量转换器件的发展。
AI.method: 采用分子束外延（MBE）技术生长1x1 mm² InAs p-i-n热辐射二极管，通过调整生长温度（450°C）、As₂流量（约3倍化学计量比）和In源炉温度（尖端比基座高150°C）来优化器件性能。
AI.result: 优化后的器件击穿电压超过0.3 V，反向饱和电流密度为辐射极限的200倍。
AI.conclusion: 通过优化MBE生长条件，成功制备了具有较好击穿电压特性的InAs热辐射二极管，但反向饱和电流仍远高于辐射极限，表明器件性能还有进一步改进空间。

title: Magneto Transport and Spin Reorientation in Pt Co78Ho22 Heterostructures Near the Sublattice Compensation Temperature
summary: Metallic amorphous ferrimagnets of 3d transition metals (TM) and rare earths (RE) with 4f electrons exhibit rich magneto transport behavior due to the interplay between the 3d and 4f magnetic sublattices and their interaction with mobile charges. Tuning the TM and RE concentrations in the alloy can effectively modulate the compensation temperature, where the moments of the two sublattices point in opposite direction leading to a net zero magnetization. Despite extensive magnetotransport studies in Gd and Tb based 3d 4f systems, Ho based alloys remain comparatively underexplored, even though Ho possesses the largest orbital angular momentum (OAM) among the lanthanides. This unquenched OAM can strongly impact magnetic anisotropy and magnetotransport in ferrimagnetic heterostructures. Here, we have investigated the anomalous Hall resistivity , dc magnetization, and spin Hall magnetoresistance (SHMR) of Co78Ho22.Al film and a Pt.Co78Ho22.Al heterostructure deposited using multitarget magnetron sputtering. The Hall resistivity of both systems shows a distinct sign reversal and prominent wing-shaped hysteresis loops in the vicinity of the compensation temperature (Tcomp), which is accompanied by the minimum saturation magnetization near Tcomp. Furthermore, the SHMR in Pt.Co78Ho22.Al film is enhanced due to the Pt layer. These HM interface-induced prominent features of magneto-transport are addressed in the light of the existing theories of spin flop transitions, spin orbit torque, and microscopic phase separation, which may lead to the formation of 3d and 4f magnetic clusters in the film.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了Co78Ho22.Al薄膜及Pt/Co78Ho22.Al异质结构中的反常霍尔效应、磁化强度和自旋霍尔磁电阻，发现其在补偿温度附近出现符号反转和翼状磁滞回线，且Pt层增强了自旋霍尔磁电阻。这些现象可通过自旋翻转跃迁、自旋轨道矩和微观相分离理论解释。
AI.motivation: 尽管Gd和Tb基3d-4f铁磁体已被广泛研究，但具有最大轨道角动量的Ho基合金仍未被充分探索，而Ho的未猝灭轨道角动量可能对铁磁异质结构中的磁各向异性和磁输运产生重要影响。
AI.method: 采用多靶磁控溅射法制备Co78Ho22.Al薄膜和Pt/Co78Ho22.Al异质结构，通过反常霍尔电阻率、直流磁化强度和自旋霍尔磁电阻测量进行表征。
AI.result: 两种体系在补偿温度附近均出现Hall电阻的符号反转和翼状磁滞回线，伴随饱和磁化强度最小值；Pt层导致自旋霍尔磁电阻增强。
AI.conclusion: Ho基3d-4f非晶铁磁体在补偿温度附近展现出丰富的磁输运现象，且可通过重金属界面工程进行调控，为相关自旋电子学器件设计提供了新思路。
